// w×h pixels; it knows nothing about the screen-space scissor set by Clay.  Applying
// the screen-space scissor to the pool RT clips everything to zero → black rect.
// Fix: save the screen-space scissor before the push, clear it so shapes record
// scissor_on=false, and restore it after the matching pop/clear.
@(private)
Layer_Scissor_Save :: struct {
	scissor_on: bool,
	scissor:    [4]f32,
}

// Gate 3.3: Filter stack entry — saved when Cmd_Set_Filter is processed during replay.
// Note: matrix/scissor state is NOT stored here.  Coordinate offset is baked into
// each command's common.transform at recording time by g2d_set_filter/g2d_clear_filter.
@(private = "file")
Filter_Stack_Entry :: struct {
	pool_idx:  int,                     // index into ctx.layer_rt_pool (content RT)
	parent_rt: ^renderer.Render_Target, // saved ctx.active_rt before the push
	filter:    renderer.Image_Filter,
	x, y, w, h: f32,
}

// Gate 3.3: Pending filter — saved by Cmd_Clear_Filter, executed by _g2d_apply_pending_filters.
// All pool indices are into ctx.layer_rt_pool; -1 = not used.
@(private = "file")
Pending_Filter_Entry :: struct {
	filter:          renderer.Image_Filter,
	filter_pool_idx: int, // source content RT (content drawn between set/clear)
	temp_pool_idx:   int, // ping-pong scratch RT (-1 if not needed)
	output_pool_idx: int, // final output RT (-1 = use filter_rt in-place for composite)
	shadow_pool_idx: int, // shadow RT (Drop_Shadow only; -1 otherwise)
	x, y, w, h:      f32,
}


// ============================================================================
// RENDER PASS MANAGEMENT WRAPPERS
// Encapsulate sg.begin_pass/sg.end_pass with proper context tracking
// ============================================================================

g2d_begin_pass_immediate :: proc(pass: sg.Pass, pass_type: Pass_Type = .Screen) { 	//default to Screen pass
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.G2D,
			"[RENDER_PASS] g2d_begin_pass called - setting current_pass_active=true",
		)
	}
	ctx.current_pass_active = true
	ctx.current_pass_type = pass_type
	ctx.pass_nesting_depth = 1
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.G2D,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[RENDER_PASS] After setting: current_pass_active=%b, type=%v",
				ctx.current_pass_active,
				ctx.current_pass_type,
			),
		)
	}
	sg.begin_pass(pass)
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(.G2D, "g2d_begin_pass completed - current_pass_active should be true")
	}
}

g2d_end_pass_vtable :: proc() {
	// P1.1: Only end the Sokol pass here. Draw-list flushing and batch
	// rendering are already handled by flushGpuPrePass + endFrame.
	g2d_end_pass_immediate()
}

g2d_end_pass_immediate :: proc() {
	sg.end_pass()
	ctx.pass_nesting_depth -= 1
	if ctx.pass_nesting_depth == 0 {
		logging.debug(.G2D, "g2d_end_pass called - ending render pass")
		ctx.current_pass_active = false
		ctx.current_pass_type = .None
	} else {
		logging.info(
			.G2D,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[RENDER_PASS] g2d_end_pass called - nested pass (depth=%d)",
				ctx.pass_nesting_depth,
			),
		)
	}
}

// Initialize render pass tracking system
// Should be called during G2D initialization
g2d_init_pass_tracking :: proc() {
	ctx.current_pass_active = false
	ctx.current_pass_type = .None
	ctx.pass_nesting_depth = 0
	logging.info(.G2D, "[RENDER_PASS] Initialized pass tracking system")
}


// ============================================================================
// END OF RENDER PASS MANAGEMENT WRAPPERS
// ============================================================================


@(private)
ctx: G2D_Context

@(private)
persistent_renderer: renderer.Renderer

@(private)
immediate_renderer: renderer.Renderer

@(private)
_g2d_make_common :: proc(layer: renderer.Draw_Layer) -> renderer.Draw_Command_Common {
	return {
		layer = layer,
		opacity = ctx.curr_opacity,
		target = ctx.active_rt,
		transform = ctx.curr_matrix,
		scissor = ctx.curr_scissor,
		scissor_on = ctx.curr_scissor_on && (ctx.curr_scissor_target == ctx.active_rt),
		stencil_level = u8(ctx.stencil_clip_level),
		pip_variant = u8(ctx.curr_pip_variant),
	}
}

// Optional override for shared atlas size; must be set BEFORE any fonts are used
// Public API: Set atlas size override (delegates to renderer)
g2d_set_atlas_size_override :: proc(w, h: i32) {
	renderer.SetAtlasSizeOverride(w, h)
}

// Internal: expose current override to other renderer files (delegates to renderer)
g2d_get_atlas_size_override :: proc() -> (i32, i32) {
	return renderer.getAtlasSizeOverride()
}

// Internal helper to keep batch counts and vertex data in sync
// Using variadic parameters (..V) to automatically calculate counts
@(private)
add_vertices :: proc(batch: ^G2D_Batch, vertices: ..renderer.G2D_Vertex) {
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(.G2D, fmt.tprintf("[ADD_VERTS] batch=%p, count=%d", batch, len(vertices)))
	}
	append(&ctx.vertices, ..vertices)
	batch.v_count += i32(len(vertices))
}

// Sum RGBA components of vertices in [start_vtx, end_vtx)
@(private)
span_color_checksum :: proc(start_vtx, end_vtx: i32) -> f32 {
	s := start_vtx
	e := end_vtx
	if s < 0 do s = 0
	max_v := i32(len(ctx.vertices))
	if e > max_v do e = max_v
	if e <= s do return 0
	sum: f32 = 0
	for i in s ..< e {
		v := ctx.vertices[i]
		sum += v.color.x + v.color.y + v.color.z + v.color.w
	}
	return sum
}

// Phase 2.1 --- Matrix Stack API ---

//Phase 0: setup of shader, frame and batching
@(private)
resolve_color :: proc(param_color: [4]f32) -> [4]f32 {
	c := (param_color == {0, 0, 0, 0}) ? ctx.curr_color : param_color
	c.a *= ctx.curr_opacity
	return c
}

@(private)
// Phase 10.1.c Beautification: Documentation of invariants; no semantic changes
// Batching key = (image, sampler, scissor_on+rect, active render target). Preserves call-order. [10.4.b]
get_batch :: proc() -> ^G2D_Batch {
	need_new := true
	if len(ctx.batches) > 0 {
		last := ctx.batches[len(ctx.batches) - 1]
		// Stencil batches must NEVER be reused for normal drawing: their vertex range
		// is owned by the stencil fill pass (fan + cover quad) and any extra vertices
		// appended after the cover quad are silently ignored at render time.
		if last.is_stencil_batch {
			need_new = true
		} else {
			same_image := last.image == ctx.curr_image
			same_smp := last.sampler.id == ctx.curr_sampler.id
			// Phase 11: Check pipeline
			same_pip := last.pipeline.id == ctx.curr_pipeline.id

			same_scissor := (last.scissor_on == ctx.curr_scissor_on)
			if same_scissor && last.scissor_on {
				s1 := last.scissor; s2 := ctx.curr_scissor
				same_scissor = s1.x == s2.x && s1.y == s2.y && s1.z == s2.z && s1.w == s2.w
			}
			need_new = !(same_image &&
				same_scissor &&
				same_smp &&
				same_pip &&
				last.target == ctx.active_rt)
		}
	}

	// Automatic Stencil-Comparison logic for clipping
	actual_variant := ctx.curr_pip_variant
	// If clipping is active, we MUST switch to the Clippable variant
	// but only if the user hasn't explicitly set a stencil write/cover pipeline
	// BUGFIX: Only override if the current pipeline is the default Normal pipeline
	if ctx.stencil_clip_level > 0 && actual_variant == .Normal {
		actual_variant = .Clippable
	}

	if len(ctx.batches) > 0 {
		last := ctx.batches[len(ctx.batches) - 1]

		// Force new batch if clippable variant changed (Normal -> Clippable)
		target_pip := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, actual_variant, ctx.stencil_clip_level)
		if last.pipeline.id != target_pip.id do need_new = true

		same_image := last.image == ctx.curr_image
		same_smp := last.sampler.id == ctx.curr_sampler.id
		same_scissor := (last.scissor_on == ctx.curr_scissor_on)
		// ... existing same_scissor check ...
	}

	if need_new {
		current_pip := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, actual_variant, ctx.stencil_clip_level)

		append(
			&ctx.batches,
			G2D_Batch {
				v_offset = i32(len(ctx.vertices)),
				v_count = 0,
				image = ctx.curr_image,
				scissor_on = ctx.curr_scissor_on,
				scissor = ctx.curr_scissor,
				sampler = ctx.curr_sampler,
				target = ctx.active_rt,
				pipeline = current_pip,
				stencil_ref = ctx.stencil_clip_level,
				flushed = false,
			},
		)
		when logging.DEBUG_G2D {
			fmt.printf(
				"[BATCH_DIAG] new batch: idx=%d scissor_on=%v\n",
				len(ctx.batches) - 1,
				ctx.curr_scissor_on,
			)
		}
	}

	// Increment v_count is handled by drafting procedures.
	return &ctx.batches[len(ctx.batches) - 1]
}

// Phase 2 --- Batch Merging ---
// Batch merging functions to reduce draw calls

can_merge_batches :: proc(a, b: G2D_Batch) -> bool {
	// Stencil batches must never be merged - they have ordered GPU state side effects
	if a.is_stencil_batch || b.is_stencil_batch do return false
	// Gate 4.1: instanced batches have different buffer layout — never merge with normal batches.
	if a.is_instanced || b.is_instanced do return false

	// Basic compatibility checks
	if a.image.id != b.image.id do return false
	if a.sampler.id != b.sampler.id do return false
	if a.pipeline.id != b.pipeline.id do return false
	if a.target != b.target do return false
	if a.stencil_ref != b.stencil_ref do return false

	// Scissor compatibility
	if a.scissor_on != b.scissor_on do return false
	if a.scissor_on {
		if a.scissor != b.scissor do return false
	}

	return true
}

// Debug version of can_merge_batches for troubleshooting
can_merge_batches_debug :: proc(a, b: G2D_Batch) -> bool {
	when logging.DEBUG {
		fmt.println("[MERGE_CHECK] Checking batch compatibility:")
		fmt.println("  a.is_stencil:", a.is_stencil_batch, "b.is_stencil:", b.is_stencil_batch)
		fmt.println("  a.image.id:", a.image.id, "b.image.id:", b.image.id)
		fmt.println("  a.sampler.id:", a.sampler.id, "b.sampler.id:", b.sampler.id)
		fmt.println("  a.pipeline.id:", a.pipeline.id, "b.pipeline.id:", b.pipeline.id)
		fmt.println("  a.target:", a.target, "b.target:", b.target)
		fmt.println("  a.stencil_ref:", a.stencil_ref, "b.stencil_ref:", b.stencil_ref)
		fmt.println("  a.scissor_on:", a.scissor_on, "b.scissor_on:", b.scissor_on)
	}
	return can_merge_batches(a, b)
}

// Merge batches to reduce draw calls
merge_batches :: proc(batches: []G2D_Batch) -> []G2D_Batch {
	merged_batches := make([dynamic]G2D_Batch, context.temp_allocator)

	i := 0
	for i < len(batches) {
		// Gate 4.1: pass instanced batches through unchanged (they have v_count=0 by design).
		if batches[i].is_instanced {
			append(&merged_batches, batches[i])
			i += 1
			continue
		}
		if batches[i].v_count <= 0 {
			i += 1
			continue
		}

		start := i
		total := batches[i].v_count

		// Merge consecutive compatible batches
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			for i + 1 < len(batches) && can_merge_batches_debug(batches[i], batches[i + 1]) {
				i += 1
				total += batches[i].v_count
			}
		} else {
			for i + 1 < len(batches) && can_merge_batches(batches[i], batches[i + 1]) {
				i += 1
				total += batches[i].v_count
			}
		}

		// Create merged batch
		merged := batches[start]
		merged.v_count = total
		append(&merged_batches, merged)
		i += 1
	}

	return merged_batches[:] // Return as slice
}

// Phase 10.2 --- Pipeline Management ---
// Pipeline Cache System to minimize sg_apply_pipeline() calls and prevent pool exhaustion
G2D_Pipeline_Cache :: struct {
	cache:               map[G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Key]sg.Pipeline,
	hit_count:           u32,
	miss_count:          u32,
	fallback_pipeline:   sg.Pipeline,
	stats_enabled:       bool,

	// Phase 1: Pipeline Lifecycle Tracking
	created_pipelines:   [dynamic]sg.Pipeline,
	destroyed_pipelines: [dynamic]sg.Pipeline,
	active_pipelines:    map[sg.Pipeline]string, // pipeline -> description
}

G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Key :: struct {
	variant:      G2D_Pipeline_Variant,
	level:        u8,
	color_format: sg.Pixel_Format,
	depth_format: sg.Pixel_Format,
	sample_count: i32,
}

// Initialize pipeline cache
g2d_init_pipeline_cache :: proc(cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache, fallback: sg.Pipeline) {
	cache.cache = {}
	cache.hit_count = 0
	cache.miss_count = 0
	cache.fallback_pipeline = fallback
	cache.stats_enabled = false

	// Phase 1: Initialize pipeline tracking
	cache.created_pipelines = make([dynamic]sg.Pipeline)
	cache.destroyed_pipelines = make([dynamic]sg.Pipeline)
	cache.active_pipelines = {}
}

// Create pipeline cache key
g2d_create_pipeline_cache_key :: proc(
	variant: G2D_Pipeline_Variant,
	level: u8,
	color_fmt: sg.Pixel_Format,
	depth_fmt: sg.Pixel_Format,
	sc: i32,
) -> G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Key {
	return G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Key {
		variant = variant,
		level = level,
		color_format = color_fmt,
		depth_format = depth_fmt,
		sample_count = sc,
	}
}

// Get pipeline from cache or create new one
g2d_get_cached_pipeline :: proc(
	cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache,
	key: G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Key,
	create_fn: proc() -> sg.Pipeline,
) -> sg.Pipeline {
	// Try to find existing pipeline in cache
	if cached_pipeline, ok := cache.cache[key]; ok {
		cache.hit_count += 1
		if cache.stats_enabled {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[PIPELINE_CACHE] Hit: variant=%d level=%d (total hits: %d)",
						key.variant,
						key.level,
						cache.hit_count,
					),
				)

			}
		}
		return cached_pipeline
	}

	// Pipeline not in cache, create new one
	cache.miss_count += 1
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.Batching,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[PIPELINE_CACHE] Miss: variant=%d level=%d (total misses: %d)",
				key.variant,
				key.level,
				cache.miss_count,
			),
		)
	}

	new_pipeline := create_fn()

	// Validate the newly created pipeline
	if new_pipeline.id == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[PIPELINE_CACHE] Failed to create pipeline for variant=%d level=%d, using fallback",
					key.variant,
					key.level,
				),
			)
		}
		return cache.fallback_pipeline
	}

	// Phase 1: Track the newly created pipeline
	description := fmt.tprintf(
		"variant=%d level=%d color=%d depth=%d samples=%d",
		key.variant,
		key.level,
		key.color_format,
		key.depth_format,
		key.sample_count,
	)
	g2d_track_pipeline_creation(cache, new_pipeline, description)

	// Cache the new pipeline
	cache.cache[key] = new_pipeline
	return new_pipeline
}

// Enable pipeline cache statistics
g2d_enable_pipeline_cache_stats :: proc(cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache, enable: bool) {
	cache.stats_enabled = enable
	if enable && logging.DEBUG {
		logging.info(
			.G2D,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[PIPELINE_CACHE] Stats enabled. Current: hits=%d misses=%d cache_size=%d",
				cache.hit_count,
				cache.miss_count,
				len(cache.cache),
			),
		)
	}
}

// Pipeline cache statistics structure
G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Stats :: struct {
	hit_count:  u32,
	miss_count: u32,
	cache_size: i32,
}

// Get pipeline cache statistics
g2d_get_pipeline_cache_stats :: proc(cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache) -> G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Stats {
	return G2D_Pipeline_Cache_Stats {
		hit_count = cache.hit_count,
		miss_count = cache.miss_count,
		cache_size = i32(len(cache.cache)),
	}
}

// Phase 1: Pipeline Lifecycle Tracking Functions

// Track pipeline creation
g2d_track_pipeline_creation :: proc(
	cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache,
	pipeline: sg.Pipeline,
	description: string,
) {
	if pipeline.id != 0 {
		append(&cache.created_pipelines, pipeline)
		cache.active_pipelines[pipeline] = description
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf("[PIPELINE_TRACK] Created pipeline %d: %s", pipeline.id, description),
			)
		}
	}
}

// Track pipeline destruction (if applicable)
g2d_track_pipeline_destruction :: proc(cache: ^G2D_Pipeline_Cache, pipeline: sg.Pipeline) {
	if pipeline.id != 0 {
		append(&cache.destroyed_pipelines, pipeline)
		if cache.active_pipelines[pipeline] != "" {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[PIPELINE_TRACK] Destroyed pipeline %d: %s",
						pipeline.id,
						cache.active_pipelines[pipeline],
					),
				)
			}
			delete_key(&cache.active_pipelines, pipeline)
		}
	}
}

// Phase 1: Enhanced pipeline validation before use
g2d_validate_pipeline_before_use :: proc(pipeline: sg.Pipeline, ctx: string) -> bool {
	if pipeline.id == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf("[PIPELINE_VALIDATE] Invalid pipeline (id=0) in context: %s", ctx),
			)
		}
		return false
	}

	// Check if pipeline exists in our tracking
	// This would require maintaining a global pipeline registry

	return true
}

// Phase 1: Sokol GFX State Dump
g2d_dump_sokol_state :: proc() {
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(.Renderer, "[SOKOL_STATE] === Sokol GFX State Dump ===")
	}

	// Check current pipeline - Sokol GFX doesn't provide this directly
	// current_pipeline := sg.query_current_pipeline()
	// logging.debug(.G2D, fmt.tprintf("Current pipeline: %d", current_pipeline.id))

	// Check pipeline pool stats if available
	// This would require Sokol GFX backend-specific queries

	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(.Renderer, "[SOKOL_STATE] === End State Dump ===")
	}
}

// Safe pipeline application with validation
g2d_safe_apply_pipeline :: proc(pipeline: sg.Pipeline, fallback: sg.Pipeline) {
	if pipeline.id == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				"[PIPELINE_SAFE] Attempting to apply invalid pipeline, using fallback",
			)
		}
		sg.apply_pipeline(fallback)
	} else {
		sg.apply_pipeline(pipeline)
	}
}


// Phase 0: the init/setup function
// This function sets up the "engine" by creating the default white texture (for colored shapes),
// the shader pipeline, and the matrix stack.
g2d_setup :: proc() {
	// Performance: Allocate text buckets once with persistent allocator and reasonable capacity
	// These will be cleared each frame rather than recreated
	for i in 0 ..< MAX_ATLAS_PAGES {
		ctx.text_buckets[i] = make([dynamic]Glyph_Quad, 0, 1024, runtime.default_allocator())
	}

	renderer.draw_list_init(&renderer.active_draw_list)

	shader_desc := shaders.c2d_solid_shader_desc(sg.query_backend())
	shader := sg.make_shader(shader_desc)

	env := sg.query_desc().environment.defaults
	sc := env.sample_count
	when #config(G2D_FORCE_SAMPLE1, false) {
		sc = 1
	}
	if sc <= 0 do sc = 1

	// Store main window format for cross-platform compatibility
	ctx.main_window_color_format = env.color_format
	ctx.main_window_depth_format = env.depth_format

	logging.info(
		.G2D,
		fmt.tprintf(
			"[G2D] Main window formats: color=%v, depth=%v, MSAA=%dx",
			ctx.main_window_color_format,
			ctx.main_window_depth_format,
			sc,
		),
	)

	// Phase 1: Initialize pipeline manager (NEW CLEAN SYSTEM)
	pipeline_mgr_init(&ctx.pipeline_mgr)

	// 1. Create Main Pipelines (matches sapp format/msaa)
	pipeline_mgr_create_set(
		&ctx.pipeline_mgr,
		.Screen,
		shader,
		ctx.main_window_color_format,
		ctx.main_window_depth_format,
		sc,
	)

	// CRITICAL FIX: Set the default pipeline to the main pipeline
	ctx.pip = pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Normal)
	if ctx.pip.id == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				"[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Main pipeline creation failed! Pipeline ID is 0",
			)
		}
		// Try to create a fallback pipeline using the same shader
		fallback_pipe := sg.Pipeline_Desc {
			shader = shader,
			layout = {
				attrs = {0 = {format = .FLOAT2}, 1 = {format = .FLOAT2}, 2 = {format = .FLOAT4}},
			},
			sample_count = sc,
			depth = {pixel_format = ctx.main_window_depth_format, compare = .ALWAYS, write_enabled = false},
		}
		ctx.pip = sg.make_pipeline(fallback_pipe)
		if ctx.pip.id == 0 {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					"[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Fallback pipeline creation also failed!",
				)
			}
		}
	}

	// CRITICAL FIX: Validate stencil pipelines as well
	screen_pips := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .StencilWriteNonZero)
	if screen_pips.id == 0 {
		screen_pips = pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .StencilWriteEvenOdd)
		if screen_pips.id == 0 {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(.Batching, "[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Stencil pipelines invalid!")
			}
		}
	}

	// 2. Create Offscreen Pipelines (matches offscreen target format/msaa)
	// Use the same formats as main window/environment for cross-platform compatibility
	pipeline_mgr_create_set(
		&ctx.pipeline_mgr,
		.Offscreen,
		shader,
		ctx.main_window_color_format,
		ctx.main_window_depth_format,
		1,
	)

	// 3. Create Offscreen No-Depth Pipelines (for shadows)
	pipeline_mgr_create_set(
		&ctx.pipeline_mgr,
		.OffscreenNoDepth,
		shader,
		ctx.main_window_color_format,
		.NONE,
		1,
	)

	// 4. Create SDF shape pipelines (one per set, using a separate SDF shader)
	ctx.sdf_shader = sg.make_shader(shaders.c2d_sdf_shader_desc(sg.query_backend()))
	_g2d_create_sdf_pipelines(ctx.main_window_color_format, ctx.main_window_depth_format, sc)

	// 4b. Gate 3.1: Create SDF text pipelines
	ctx.text_sdf_shader = sg.make_shader(shaders.c2d_text_sdf_shader_desc(sg.query_backend()))
	_g2d_create_text_sdf_pipelines(ctx.main_window_color_format, ctx.main_window_depth_format, sc)

	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		offscreen_normal := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Normal)
		offscreen_stencil_nonzero := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .StencilWriteNonZero)
		offscreen_stencil_evenodd := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .StencilWriteEvenOdd)
		offscreen_stencil_cover := pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .StencilCover)

		logging.debug(
			.G2D,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[PIPELINE_SETUP] Offscreen pipelines created: normal=%d, stencil_nonzero=%d, stencil_evenodd=%d, stencil_cover=%d",
				offscreen_normal.id,
				offscreen_stencil_nonzero.id,
				offscreen_stencil_evenodd.id,
				offscreen_stencil_cover.id,
			),
		)
	}

	persistent_renderer = renderer.Renderer {
		setup                     = g2d_setup,
		shutdown                  = g2d_shutdown,
		beginFrame                = g2d_begin_frame,
		flushGpuPrePass           = g2d_flush_gpu_pre_pass,
		endFrame                  = g2d_end_frame,
		setColor                  = g2d_set_color,
		fillRect                  = g2d_record_fill_rect,
		fillRectSimple            = g2d_record_fill_rect_simple,
		drawRect                  = g2d_record_draw_rect,
		fillRectRounded           = g2d_record_fill_rect_rounded,
		drawRectRounded           = g2d_record_draw_rect_rounded,
		// Phase F.2 — proper directional drop shadows & inset shadow
		dropShadowRect            = g2d_record_drop_shadow_rect,
		dropShadowCircle          = g2d_record_drop_shadow_circle,
		dropShadowNgon            = g2d_record_drop_shadow_ngon,
		insetShadowRect           = g2d_record_inset_shadow_rect,
		fillRectRoundedGradient   = g2d_record_fill_rect_rounded_gradient,
		drawLine                  = g2d_record_draw_line,
		drawLineSimple            = g2d_draw_line_simple,
		fillTriangle              = g2d_record_fill_triangle,
		drawTriangle              = g2d_record_draw_triangle,
		drawPolyline              = g2d_record_draw_polyline,
		fillPolygon               = g2d_record_fill_polygon,
		drawPolygon               = g2d_record_draw_polygon,
		fillCircle                = g2d_record_fill_circle,
		fillCircleSimple          = g2d_record_fill_circle_simple,
		drawCircle                = g2d_record_draw_circle,
		fillEllipse               = g2d_record_fill_ellipse,
		drawEllipse               = g2d_record_draw_ellipse,
		drawPoint                 = g2d_record_draw_point,
		drawPointScale            = g2d_record_draw_point_scale,
		pushMatrix                = g2d_record_push_matrix,
		popMatrix                 = g2d_record_pop_matrix,
		identityMatrix            = g2d_record_identity_matrix,
		translate                 = g2d_record_translate,
		rotate                    = g2d_record_rotate,
		scale                     = g2d_record_scale,
		applyMatrix               = g2d_record_apply_matrix,
		applyMatrix4              = g2d_record_apply_matrix4,
		loadImage                 = g2d_load_image_from_file_handle,
		destroyImage              = g2d_destroy_image_handle,
		drawImage                 = g2d_record_draw_image,
		drawTextureSimple         = g2d_record_draw_image,
		drawImageRect             = g2d_record_draw_image_rect,
		// Phase 3.2 --- Hard Clipping (GPU Scissor) ---
		setClip                   = g2d_record_set_clip,
		resetClip                 = g2d_record_reset_clip,
		pushClip                  = g2d_record_set_clip,
		popClip                   = g2d_record_reset_clip,
		getImageInfo              = g2d_get_image_info_handle,
		getInputState             = g2d_get_input_state,
		drawText                  = g2d_record_draw_text,
		drawTextAdvanced          = g2d_record_draw_text_advanced,
		drawTextLayout            = g2d_record_draw_text_layout,
		measureText               = g2d_measure_text,
		pathBegin                 = g2d_path_begin,
		pathMoveTo                = g2d_path_move_to,
		pathLineTo                = g2d_path_line_to,
		pathArcTo                 = g2d_path_arc_to,
		pathQuadTo                = g2d_path_quad_to,
		pathCubicTo               = g2d_path_cubic_to,
		pathClose                 = g2d_path_close,
		pathDraw                  = g2d_record_path_draw,
		pathFill                  = g2d_record_path_fill,
		fillBezierQuadratic       = g2d_record_fill_bezier_quadratic,
		fillBezierCubic           = g2d_record_fill_bezier_cubic,
		drawBezierQuadratic       = g2d_record_draw_bezier_quadratic,
		drawBezierCubic           = g2d_record_draw_bezier_cubic,
		fillNgon                  = g2d_record_fill_ngon,
		drawNgon                  = g2d_record_draw_ngon,
		fillPie                   = g2d_record_fill_pie,
		drawArc                   = g2d_record_draw_arc,
		fillArc                   = g2d_record_fill_arc,
		fillStar                  = g2d_record_fill_star,
		drawStar                  = g2d_record_draw_star,
		fillRing                  = g2d_record_fill_ring,
		drawRing                  = g2d_record_draw_ring,
		fillWedge                 = g2d_record_fill_wedge,
		drawWedge                 = g2d_record_draw_wedge,
		drawTextOnPath            = g2d_record_draw_text_on_path,
		createMaterial            = g2d_material_make_handle,
		createMaterialSolid       = g2d_material_make_solid,
		drawImageMat              = g2d_draw_image_mat,
		drawImageRectMat          = g2d_draw_image_rect_mat,
		drawImageRectUvMat        = g2d_record_draw_image_rect_uv_mat,
		draw9Slice                = g2d_draw_9slice,
		setSampling               = g2d_set_sampling,
		resetSampling             = g2d_reset_sampling,
		strokeRect                = g2d_record_stroke_rect,
		strokeRectRounded         = g2d_record_stroke_rect_rounded,
		strokeLine                = g2d_record_stroke_line,
		strokePolyline            = g2d_record_stroke_polyline,
		strokePolygon             = g2d_record_stroke_polygon,
		strokeCircle              = g2d_record_stroke_circle,
		strokeEllipse             = g2d_record_stroke_ellipse,
		strokeArc                 = g2d_record_stroke_arc,
		strokeStar                = g2d_record_stroke_star,
		strokeBezierQuadratic     = g2d_record_stroke_bezier_quadratic,
		strokeBezierCubic         = g2d_record_stroke_bezier_cubic,
		strokeGradient            = g2d_record_stroke_gradient,
		pathStroke                = g2d_record_path_stroke,
		beginClipPath             = g2d_begin_clip_path,
		endClipPath               = g2d_end_clip_path,
		clipPath                  = g2d_clip_path,
		beginMask                 = g2d_record_begin_mask,
		endMask                   = g2d_record_end_mask,
		beginMaskedDraw           = g2d_record_begin_masked_draw,
		endMaskedDraw             = g2d_record_end_masked_draw,
		applyPerspective          = renderer.default_applyPerspective,
		applyPerspectiveMatrix    = renderer.default_applyPerspectiveMatrix,
		pushPerspective           = renderer.default_pushPerspective,
		popPerspective            = renderer.default_popPerspective,
		spriteMake                = g2d_sprite_make_handle,
		spriteUpdate              = g2d_sprite_update,
		spritePlay                = g2d_sprite_play,
		spritePause               = g2d_sprite_pause,
		spriteResume              = g2d_sprite_resume,
		spriteFrameUV             = g2d_sprite_frame_uv,
		drawSprite                = g2d_draw_sprite_deferred, // Gate 2.6: deferred via draw list
		drawSpriteFrame           = g2d_draw_sprite_frame_deferred, // Gate 2.6: deferred via draw list
		beginGroup                = g2d_begin_group,
		endGroup                  = g2d_end_group,
		pushLayer                 = g2d_push_layer,
		popLayer                  = g2d_pop_layer,
		setFilter                 = g2d_set_filter,
		clearFilter               = g2d_clear_filter,

		// Phase DX: Asset Management
		loadAsset                 = g2d_load_asset_wrapper,
		parseAsset                = g2d_parse_asset_wrapper,
		renderAsset               = g2d_record_render_asset,
		defaultAssetRenderConfig  = g2d_default_asset_render_config_wrapper,
		defaultAssetManagerConfig = g2d_default_asset_manager_config_wrapper,
		initAssetManager          = g2d_init_asset_manager_wrapper,
		shutdownAssetManager      = g2d_shutdown_asset_manager_wrapper,

		// Phase DX: Render Target Management
		createRenderTarget        = g2d_create_render_target_wrapper,
		destroyRenderTarget       = g2d_destroy_render_target,
		setRenderTarget           = g2d_set_render_target,

		// Phase E: Gaussian Blur
		applyGaussianBlur         = g2d_apply_gaussian_blur,
		applyBoxBlur              = g2d_apply_box_blur,
		applyBloom                = g2d_apply_bloom,
		applyVignette             = g2d_apply_vignette,
		drawRenderTarget          = g2d_draw_render_target_vtable,
		// Phase DX: Rendering Pipeline
		beginPass                 = g2d_begin_pass,
		endPass                   = g2d_end_pass_vtable,

		// Phase DX: Memory Management
		getArenaUsage             = g2d_get_arena_usage,
		getArenaAllocator         = g2d_get_arena_allocator,

		// Gate 1.3: Blend modes
		setBlendMode              = g2d_set_blend_mode,
		resetBlendMode            = g2d_reset_blend_mode,

		// Gate 1.4: Dash patterns
		setDash                   = g2d_set_dash,
		resetDash                 = g2d_reset_dash,

		// Gate 1.5: Camera2D
		pushCamera2D              = g2d_push_camera2d,
		popCamera2D               = g2d_pop_camera2d,

		// Gate 3.4: GPU callback command
		addGpuCallback            = g2d_record_gpu_callback,

		// Gate 3.5: Recording
		beginRecord               = g2d_begin_record,
		endRecord                 = g2d_end_record,
		replay                    = g2d_replay,

		// Gate 4.1: GPU instanced particles
		drawParticlesInstanced    = g2d_record_draw_particles_instanced,
	}
	renderer.active_renderer = &persistent_renderer

	// BugFixM3 [2026-01-10]: enlarge streaming vertex buffer for mid-frame flushes.
	ctx.vbuf_capacity = 32 * 1024 * 1024 // Increased to 32MB for complex SVGs
	ctx.bind.vertex_buffers[0] = sg.make_buffer(
		{
			size = uint(ctx.vbuf_capacity),
			usage = {vertex_buffer = true, immutable = false, stream_update = true},
		},
	)

	white_pixel: u32 = 0xFFFFFFFF
	ctx.white_image = sg.make_image(
		{
			width = 1,
			height = 1,
			data = {mip_levels = {0 = {ptr = &white_pixel, size = size_of(u32)}}},
		},
	)
	ctx.smp = sg.make_sampler(
		{
			min_filter = .LINEAR,
			mag_filter = .LINEAR,
			wrap_u = .CLAMP_TO_EDGE,
			wrap_v = .CLAMP_TO_EDGE,
		},
	)
	ctx.white_view = sg.make_view({texture = {image = ctx.white_image}})
	ctx.bind.samplers[shaders.SMP_smp] = ctx.smp
	// Phase 10.4.b: init sampler cache and current sampler
	ctx.sampler_cache = make(map[u32]sg.Sampler, 0, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.curr_sampler = ctx.smp
	image_path_cache = make(map[string]renderer.Image_Handle, 64, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Initializing Dynamic Arrays
	// Performance: Pre-allocate larger capacities to avoid heap reallocations during frame
	ctx.vertices = make([dynamic]renderer.G2D_Vertex, 0, 65536, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.batches = make([dynamic]G2D_Batch, 0, 512, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.matrix_stack = make([dynamic]matrix[3, 3]f32, 0, 16, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Phase 6 Stability: Initialize Transient Arena (16MB for per-frame scratch)
	ctx.arena_buffer = make([]byte, 16 * 1024 * 1024, runtime.default_allocator())
	mem.arena_init(&ctx.arena, ctx.arena_buffer)

	// Phase 6.1: Initialize New Arena Architecture
	// Frame arena: 12MB for frame-long data (batches, text buckets, etc.)
	ctx.frame_arena_buf = make([]byte, config.FRAME_ARENA_SIZE, runtime.default_allocator())
	mem.arena_init(&ctx.frame_arena, ctx.frame_arena_buf)

	// Path arena: 6MB for short-lived path operations (contours, tessellation, etc.)
	ctx.path_arena_buf = make([]byte, config.PATH_ARENA_SIZE, runtime.default_allocator())
	mem.arena_init(&ctx.path_arena, ctx.path_arena_buf)

	// Phase F.2.5: Shadow cache - FIXED: Use persistent allocator for map structure
	ctx.shadow_cache = make(
		map[u64]^renderer.Shadow_Cache_Entry,
		16,
		runtime.default_allocator(),
	)
	ctx.pending_blurs = make(
		[dynamic]renderer.Pending_Blur,
		0,
		16,
		mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.frame_arena),
	)
	// Phase F.3: Shadow cache management
	ctx.shadow_cache_keys = make(
		[dynamic]renderer.Shadow_Key,
		0,
		64,
		mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.frame_arena),
	)
	ctx.max_shadow_cache_entries = 64 // Prevent unbounded growth

	// Gate 3.2: Layer RT pool (persistent allocator — survives frame arena resets)
	ctx.layer_rt_pool = make([dynamic]Layer_RT_Pool_Entry, 0, MAX_LAYER_POOL_SIZE, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.layer_stack = make([dynamic]Layer_Stack_Entry, 0, 16, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.layer_scissor_stack = make([dynamic]Layer_Scissor_Save, 0, 16, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Initializing Default State
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image
	ctx.curr_color = assets.useColorByName("white")
	ctx.curr_matrix = linalg.MATRIX3F32_IDENTITY
	// Initialize scissor state (disabled)
	ctx.curr_scissor_on = false
	ctx.curr_scissor = [4]f32{0, 0, 0, 0}
	ctx.curr_scissor_target = nil // Initialize with a default/invalid render target handle

	// Phase 11: Initialize default pipeline
	ctx.curr_pipeline = ctx.pip

	// --- DEEPER FIX: Initialize the view map with persistent allocator ---
	// We put this here so it's ready before any load_image calls occur
	ctx.image_views = make(map[u32]sg.View, 0, runtime.default_allocator())
	image_path_cache = make(map[string]renderer.Image_Handle, 64, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Phase 4.2: Initialize atlas update tracking (persistent allocator)
	ctx.dirty_fonts = make([dynamic]renderer.Font_Handle, 0, 8, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.frame_index = 0

	// Phase 6B: Initialize Path State
	ctx.current_path = make([dynamic]renderer.Path_Point, 0, 16, runtime.default_allocator())
	// Initialize default fallback cache map (persistent)
	ctx.default_fallbacks = make(map[u32][dynamic]renderer.Font_Handle, 0, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Per-script text offset defaults (pixels)
	ctx.text_offsets = Text_Offsets {
		latin  = {0, 0},
		arabic = {0, 0}, // neutral default; adjust via g2d_set_text_offset if needed
		hebrew = {0, 0},
		other  = {0, 0},
	}

	// Phase 5: Input and DPI
	ctx.input = {}
	ctx.dpi_scale = 1.0 // updated each frame via g2d_set_dpi_scale()

	// Phase 10.6: Clip Stack
	ctx.clip_stack = make([dynamic]G2D_Scissor_State, 0, 8, runtime.default_allocator())

	// Phase 11: Hierarchical Grouping State
	ctx.opacity_stack = make([dynamic]f32, 0, 8, runtime.default_allocator())
	ctx.curr_opacity = 1.0
	ctx.stencil_clip_level = 0
	ctx.curr_stencil_ref = 0

	// Initialize render pass tracking system
	g2d_init_pass_tracking()

	// Phase E: Initialize blur quad vertex buffer
	_g2d_init_blur_quad()

	// Gate 4.1: Initialize GPU instanced particle pipeline
	_g2d_init_particle_instanced()

	// CRITICAL FIX: Initialize immediate_renderer with immediate proc variants
	// This prevents nil pointer dereferences during draw list flush
	immediate_renderer = renderer.Renderer {
		setup                     = g2d_setup,
		shutdown                  = g2d_shutdown,
		beginFrame                = g2d_begin_frame,
		flushGpuPrePass           = g2d_flush_gpu_pre_pass,
		endFrame                  = g2d_end_frame,
		setColor                  = g2d_set_color,
		fillRect                  = g2d_fill_rect_immediate,
		fillRectSimple            = g2d_fill_rect_simple, // No immediate variant exists, use simple
		drawRect                  = g2d_draw_rect_immediate,
		fillRectRounded           = g2d_fill_rect_rounded_immediate,
		drawRectRounded           = g2d_draw_rect_rounded_immediate,
		// Phase F.2 — proper directional drop shadows & inset shadows
		dropShadowRect            = g2d_drop_shadow_rect_immediate,
		dropShadowCircle          = g2d_drop_shadow_circle_immediate,
		dropShadowNgon            = g2d_drop_shadow_ngon_immediate,
		insetShadowRect           = g2d_inset_shadow_rect_immediate,
		fillRectRoundedGradient   = g2d_fill_rect_rounded_gradient_immediate,
		drawLine                  = g2d_draw_line_immediate,
		drawLineSimple            = g2d_draw_line_simple,
		fillTriangle              = g2d_fill_triangle_immediate,
		drawTriangle              = g2d_draw_triangle_immediate,
		drawPolyline              = g2d_draw_polyline_immediate,
		fillPolygon               = g2d_fill_polygon_immediate,
		drawPolygon               = g2d_draw_polygon_immediate,
		fillCircle                = g2d_fill_circle_immediate,
		fillCircleSimple          = g2d_fill_circle_simple, // No immediate variant exists, use simple
		drawCircle                = g2d_draw_circle_immediate,
		fillEllipse               = g2d_fill_ellipse_immediate,
		drawEllipse               = g2d_draw_ellipse_immediate,
		drawPoint                 = g2d_draw_point_immediate,
		drawPointScale            = g2d_draw_point_scale_immediate,
		pushMatrix                = g2d_push_matrix_immediate,
		popMatrix                 = g2d_pop_matrix_immediate,
		identityMatrix            = g2d_identity_matrix_immediate,
		translate                 = g2d_translate_immediate,
		rotate                    = g2d_rotate_immediate,
		scale                     = g2d_scale_immediate,
		applyMatrix               = g2d_apply_matrix_immediate,
		applyMatrix4              = g2d_apply_matrix4_immediate,
		loadImage                 = g2d_load_image_from_file_handle,
		destroyImage              = g2d_destroy_image_handle,
		drawImage                 = g2d_draw_image_handle,
		drawTextureSimple         = g2d_draw_texture_simple_handle,
		drawImageRect             = g2d_draw_image_rect_handle,
		// Phase 3.2 — Hard Clipping (GPU Scissor) —
		setClip                   = g2d_set_clip_immediate,
		resetClip                 = g2d_reset_clip_immediate,
		pushClip                  = g2d_set_clip_immediate,
		popClip                   = g2d_reset_clip_immediate,
		getImageInfo              = g2d_get_image_info_handle,
		getInputState             = g2d_get_input_state,
		drawText                  = g2d_draw_text_immediate,
		drawTextAdvanced          = g2d_draw_text_advanced_immediate,
		drawTextLayout            = g2d_draw_text_layout_immediate,
		measureText               = g2d_measure_text,
		pathBegin                 = g2d_path_begin,
		pathMoveTo                = g2d_path_move_to,
		pathLineTo                = g2d_path_line_to,
		pathArcTo                 = g2d_path_arc_to,
		pathQuadTo                = g2d_path_quad_to,
		pathCubicTo               = g2d_path_cubic_to,
		pathClose                 = g2d_path_close,
		pathDraw                  = g2d_path_draw_immediate,
		pathFill                  = g2d_path_fill_immediate,
		fillBezierQuadratic       = g2d_fill_bezier_quadratic_immediate,
		fillBezierCubic           = g2d_fill_bezier_cubic_immediate,
		drawBezierQuadratic       = g2d_draw_bezier_quadratic_immediate,
		drawBezierCubic           = g2d_draw_bezier_cubic_immediate,
		fillNgon                  = g2d_fill_ngon_immediate,
		drawNgon                  = g2d_draw_ngon_immediate,
		fillPie                   = g2d_fill_pie_immediate,
		drawArc                   = g2d_draw_arc_immediate,
		fillArc                   = g2d_fill_arc_immediate,
		fillStar                  = g2d_fill_star_immediate,
		drawStar                  = g2d_draw_star_immediate,
		fillRing                  = g2d_fill_ring_immediate,
		drawRing                  = g2d_draw_ring_immediate,
		fillWedge                 = g2d_fill_wedge_immediate,
		drawWedge                 = g2d_draw_wedge_immediate,
		drawTextOnPath            = g2d_draw_text_on_path,
		createMaterial            = g2d_material_make_handle,
		createMaterialSolid       = g2d_material_make_solid,
		drawImageMat              = g2d_draw_image_mat, // Use proper material variant
		drawImageRectMat          = g2d_draw_image_rect_mat, // Use proper material variant
		drawImageRectUvMat        = g2d_draw_image_rect_uv_mat, // Use proper material variant
		draw9Slice                = g2d_draw_9slice,
		setSampling               = g2d_set_sampling,
		resetSampling             = g2d_reset_sampling,
		strokeRect                = g2d_stroke_rect_immediate,
		strokeRectRounded         = g2d_stroke_rect_rounded_immediate,
		strokeLine                = g2d_stroke_line_immediate,
		strokePolyline            = g2d_stroke_polyline_immediate,
		strokePolygon             = g2d_stroke_polygon_immediate,
		strokeCircle              = g2d_stroke_circle_immediate,
		strokeEllipse             = g2d_stroke_ellipse_immediate,
		strokeArc                 = g2d_stroke_arc_immediate,
		strokeStar                = g2d_stroke_star_immediate,
		strokeBezierQuadratic     = g2d_stroke_bezier_quadratic_immediate,
		strokeBezierCubic         = g2d_stroke_bezier_cubic_immediate,
		strokeGradient            = g2d_stroke_gradient_immediate,
		pathStroke                = g2d_path_stroke_immediate,
		beginClipPath             = g2d_begin_clip_path,
		endClipPath               = g2d_end_clip_path,
		clipPath                  = g2d_clip_path,
		beginMask                 = g2d_begin_mask,
		endMask                   = g2d_end_mask,
		beginMaskedDraw           = g2d_begin_masked_draw,
		endMaskedDraw             = g2d_end_masked_draw,
		applyPerspective          = renderer.default_applyPerspective,
		applyPerspectiveMatrix    = renderer.default_applyPerspectiveMatrix,
		pushPerspective           = renderer.default_pushPerspective,
		popPerspective            = renderer.default_popPerspective,
		spriteMake                = g2d_sprite_make_handle,
		spriteUpdate              = g2d_sprite_update,
		spritePlay                = g2d_sprite_play,
		spritePause               = g2d_sprite_pause,
		spriteResume              = g2d_sprite_resume,
		spriteFrameUV             = g2d_sprite_frame_uv,
		drawSprite                = g2d_draw_sprite,
		drawSpriteFrame           = g2d_draw_sprite_frame_state,
		beginGroup                = g2d_begin_group,
		endGroup                  = g2d_end_group,
		pushLayer                 = g2d_push_layer,
		popLayer                  = g2d_pop_layer,
		setFilter                 = g2d_set_filter,
		clearFilter               = g2d_clear_filter,

		// Phase DX: Asset Management
		loadAsset                 = g2d_load_asset_wrapper,
		parseAsset                = g2d_parse_asset_wrapper,
		renderAsset               = g2d_render_asset_immediate,
		defaultAssetRenderConfig  = g2d_default_asset_render_config_wrapper,
		defaultAssetManagerConfig = g2d_default_asset_manager_config_wrapper,
		initAssetManager          = g2d_init_asset_manager_wrapper,
		shutdownAssetManager      = g2d_shutdown_asset_manager_wrapper,

		// Phase DX: Render Target Management
		createRenderTarget        = g2d_create_render_target_wrapper,
		destroyRenderTarget       = g2d_destroy_render_target,
		setRenderTarget           = g2d_set_render_target,

		// Phase E: Gaussian Blur
		applyGaussianBlur         = g2d_apply_gaussian_blur,
		applyBoxBlur              = g2d_apply_box_blur,
		applyBloom                = g2d_apply_bloom,
		applyVignette             = g2d_apply_vignette,
		drawRenderTarget          = g2d_draw_render_target_vtable,

		// Phase DX: Rendering Pipeline
		beginPass                 = g2d_begin_pass_wrapper, // Use wrapper for proper type conversion
		endPass                   = g2d_end_pass_immediate,

		// Phase DX: Memory Management
		getArenaUsage             = g2d_get_arena_usage,
		getArenaAllocator         = g2d_get_arena_allocator,

		// Gate 1.3: Blend modes
		setBlendMode              = g2d_set_blend_mode,
		resetBlendMode            = g2d_reset_blend_mode,

		// Gate 1.4: Dash patterns
		setDash                   = g2d_set_dash,
		resetDash                 = g2d_reset_dash,

		// Gate 1.5: Camera2D
		pushCamera2D              = g2d_push_camera2d,
		popCamera2D               = g2d_pop_camera2d,

		// Gate 3.4: GPU callback command
		addGpuCallback            = g2d_record_gpu_callback,

		// Gate 3.5: Recording
		beginRecord               = g2d_begin_record,
		endRecord                 = g2d_end_record,
		replay                    = g2d_replay,
	}

	// G.5.4: Font manager lifecycle folded into g2d (fm no longer called from main.odin)
	fm_init()

} //end of g2d_setup

//Phase 3.3 We add a clean shutdown procedure
g2d_shutdown :: proc() {
	// 1. Destroy all cached image views and their images (e.g., font atlas).
	//    Short: free both view and backing image; destroy view first, then image.
	//    Safe: images destroyed elsewhere via g2d_destroy_image are removed from this map already.
	for img_id, view in ctx.image_views {
		sg.destroy_view(view)
		sg.destroy_image(sg.Image{id = img_id})
	}
	delete(ctx.image_views)

	// 2. Destroy core renderer resources [cite: 8, 13]
	sg.destroy_image(ctx.white_image)
	sg.destroy_view(ctx.white_view)
	sg.destroy_sampler(ctx.smp)
	sg.destroy_pipeline(ctx.pip)
	sg.destroy_buffer(ctx.bind.vertex_buffers[0])

	// Phase 10.4.b: destroy cached samplers
	for _, smp in ctx.sampler_cache {sg.destroy_sampler(smp)}
	delete(ctx.sampler_cache)

	// G.1: destroy image path cache (keys are cloned strings)
	for path in image_path_cache {
		delete(path, runtime.default_allocator())
	}
	delete(image_path_cache)

	// 3. Free Odin dynamic memory
	delete(ctx.vertices)
	delete(ctx.batches)
	delete(ctx.matrix_stack)
	delete(ctx.current_path)

	// Phase 10.Y: Complete shutdown cleanup to prevent memory leaks
	// Delete per-frame tracking structures allocated in g2d_setup()
	delete(ctx.dirty_fonts)
	// Delete fallback cache map and inner dynamic arrays
	for _, fb in ctx.default_fallbacks {
		delete(fb)
	}
	delete(ctx.default_fallbacks)
	delete(ctx.clip_stack)
	delete(ctx.opacity_stack)

	// Phase F.2.5: Clean up shadow cache (entries are heap-allocated, free each)
	for _, entry in ctx.shadow_cache {
		g2d_destroy_render_target(entry.rt_shadow)
		g2d_destroy_render_target(entry.rt_temp)
		free(entry)
	}
	delete(ctx.shadow_cache)
	delete(ctx.pending_blurs)

	// Note: arena_buffer is managed by mem.arena_init/free_all, not manually deleted
	// Delete text bucket arrays (one per atlas page)
	for i in 0 ..< MAX_ATLAS_PAGES {
		delete(ctx.text_buckets[i])
	}

	// Phase 1: Cleanup pipeline manager (NEW CLEAN SYSTEM)
	pipeline_mgr_destroy(&ctx.pipeline_mgr)

	// Gate 3.2: Destroy layer RT pool
	_g2d_layer_pool_destroy()

	// Gate 4.1: Destroy particle instanced resources
	sg.destroy_pipeline(ctx.particle_pip_screen)
	sg.destroy_pipeline(ctx.particle_pip_offscr)
	sg.destroy_pipeline(ctx.particle_pip_add_screen)
	sg.destroy_pipeline(ctx.particle_pip_add_offscr)
	sg.destroy_shader(ctx.particle_shader)
	sg.destroy_buffer(ctx.particle_template_buf)
	sg.destroy_buffer(ctx.particle_inst_buf)

	// G.5.4: Font manager lifecycle folded into g2d
	fm_shutdown()
} //end of g2d_shutdown

// setDpiScale sets the DPI scale used by the renderer.
// Called by engine/app_sokol.odin once per frame before beginFrame.
setDpiScale :: proc(dpi: f32) {
	ctx.dpi_scale = dpi
}

// Phase 22.1: Manual control over renderer mode
// Allows switching between deferred (persistent) and immediate modes.
g2d_set_immediate_mode :: proc(enabled: bool) {
	ctx.immediate_mode = enabled
	if enabled {
		renderer.active_renderer = &immediate_renderer
	} else {
		renderer.active_renderer = &persistent_renderer
	}
}

//Phase 0: start the drawing frame
g2d_begin_frame :: proc(width, height: f32) {
	// Phase 4.2: advance frame index and reset per-frame dirty list
	ctx.frame_index += 1
	renderer.setFrameIndex(ctx.frame_index)
	clear(&ctx.dirty_fonts)
	// Reset per-frame stale GI skip counter
	ctx.gi_stale_skips_this_frame = 0

	// Prepare atlas space for any deferred evictions from the previous frame
	atlas_frame_prepare()

	// Phase 6 Stability: Reset Transient Arena for the new frame
	mem.arena_free_all(&ctx.arena)
	// Performance: Redirect temp allocator to our high-speed arena for all sub-calls
	// This ensures that all 'make' calls in shaper/itemize use the arena.
	context.temp_allocator = mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.arena)

	// Phase 6.1: Reset New Frame Arena (replaces context.temp_allocator hijacking)
	mem.arena_free_all(&ctx.frame_arena)
	ctx.frame_arena_peak = 0 // Reset peak tracking for new frame
	// Reinitialize pending_blurs from the fresh frame_arena. The old backing buffer was
	// invalidated by arena_free_all; without this the next append could corrupt other arena data.
	ctx.pending_blurs = make([dynamic]renderer.Pending_Blur, 0, 16, mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.frame_arena))

	// Phase 6.2: Reset Path Arena at frame start (will be reset per-path too)
	mem.arena_free_all(&ctx.path_arena)
	ctx.path_arena_peak = 0 // Reset peak tracking for new frame

	// Performance: Clear existing buckets instead of recreating them
	// Buckets are allocated once in g2d_setup with persistent allocator
	for p in 0 ..< MAX_ATLAS_PAGES {
		clear(&ctx.text_buckets[p])
	}

	// 1. Reset drawing data
	clear(&ctx.vertices)
	clear(&ctx.batches)
	renderer.draw_list_clear(&renderer.active_draw_list)
	ctx.debug_appended_bytes = 0
	ctx.vertices_flushed = false
	ctx.vbuf_appended_count = 0 // Phase 6: Reset upload counter

	// Reset per-frame state to prevent leakage
	ctx.stencil_clip_level = 0
	ctx.curr_pip_variant = .Normal
	ctx.curr_scissor_on = false
	ctx.active_rt = nil
	pipeline_mgr_activate(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Screen)

	// Phase 5: DPI scale is set externally via g2d_set_dpi_scale() before beginFrame

	// 2. Update environment state
	// Note: width/height from sapp are already physical pixels if high_dpi is enabled.
	// We store logical size for the coordinate system if needed, or physical size for the buffer.
	if width != ctx.prev_screen_w || height != ctx.prev_screen_h {
		if ctx.prev_screen_w != 0 || ctx.prev_screen_h != 0 {
			// Screen was resized — all cached shadow RTs are sized for old tile dimensions.
			// Clearing here prevents the 512-image Sokol pool from exhausting after rapid resize.
			_g2d_clear_shadow_cache()
		}
		ctx.prev_screen_w = width
		ctx.prev_screen_h = height
	}
	ctx.screen_w = width
	ctx.screen_h = height

	// 3. Reset transformation state (Crucial Fix)  andded in Pahse 3.3
	clear(&ctx.matrix_stack)
	ctx.curr_matrix = linalg.MATRIX3F32_IDENTITY // Ensure every frame starts clean

	// Reset scissor for new frame
	ctx.curr_scissor_on = false
	clear(&ctx.clip_stack)
	clear(&ctx.layer_scissor_stack)

	// Reset grouping state
	clear(&ctx.opacity_stack)
	ctx.curr_opacity = 1.0

	// Phase 3.4: Reset vertex buffer offset at frame start to prevent stale offsets across frames
	ctx.bind.vertex_buffer_offsets[0] = 0
	// BugFixM3 [2026-01-10]: reset per-frame append counter for streaming buffer.
	ctx.debug_appended_bytes = 0

	// CRITICAL FIX: Reset all batch state to prevent accumulation across resizes
	clear(&ctx.batches)
	ctx.vertices_flushed = false

	// CRITICAL FIX: Reset pipeline state to prevent state leakage
	ctx.curr_pipeline = ctx.pip
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image
	ctx.curr_sampler = ctx.smp
	ctx.curr_sampler_filter = .Linear // Phase 22: Default to Linear for smoother text/images
	ctx.curr_sampler_repeat = false
	ctx.curr_sampler_mipmap = false
	ctx.curr_scissor_on = false
	ctx.curr_scissor = [4]f32{0, 0, 0, 0}
	ctx.curr_stencil_ref = 0
	ctx.stencil_clip_level = 0 // FIX: reset stencil clip level to prevent state accumulation
	ctx.active_rt = nil // ADDED: reset active render target at frame start to fix problem with offscreen rendering state leakage
	pipeline_mgr_activate(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Screen) // ADDED ensure screen pipeline is active

	// CRITICAL FIX: Aggressive memory cleanup for resize prevention
	// Clear vertex buffer if it's grown too large, indicating potential resize accumulation
	if i32(len(ctx.vertices)) > ctx.vbuf_capacity / (2 * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))) {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Memory,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[RESIZE_CLEANUP] Frame %d: Clearing large vertex buffer (%d vertices) to prevent memory accumulation",
					ctx.frame_index,
					len(ctx.vertices),
				),
			)
		}
		clear(&ctx.vertices)
	}

	// CRITICAL FIX: Monitor and prevent image view accumulation
	if len(ctx.image_views) > 100 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Memory,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[RESIZE_CLEANUP] Frame %d: Clearing accumulated image views (%d views)",
					ctx.frame_index,
					len(ctx.image_views),
				),
			)
		}
		clear(&ctx.image_views)
	}

	// CRITICAL FIX: Clear temporary allocator to prevent memory leaks
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.Memory,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[RESIZE_PREVENTION] Frame %d: Cleared batches and reset state",
				ctx.frame_index,
			),
		)
	}

	// Phase 10-X: Reset the current image to white_image to prevent batching issues
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image

	// Phase 10.Y: Memory profiling - track image_views map growth
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		if ctx.frame_index % 60 == 0 {
			logging.debug(
				.Memory,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[MEMORY_PROFILE] frame=%d image_views=%d vertices_cap=%d batches_cap=%d",
					ctx.frame_index,
					len(ctx.image_views),
					cap(ctx.vertices),
					cap(ctx.batches),
				),
			)
		}
	}
} //end of g2d_begin_frame

g2d_get_arena_allocator :: proc() -> mem.Allocator {
	return mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.arena)
}

g2d_get_arena_usage :: proc() -> i32 {
	return i32(ctx.arena.offset)
}

// Phase 6.1: Path arena accessor for internal use
g2d_get_path_scratch :: proc() -> mem.Allocator {
	return mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.path_arena)
}

// Phase 6.2: Frame arena accessor for frame-long temporary data
g2d_get_frame_scratch :: proc() -> mem.Allocator {
	return mem.arena_allocator(&ctx.frame_arena)
}

// Phase 6.2: Arena diagnostics
g2d_dump_arena_stats :: proc() {
	when config.ARENA_STATS {
		logging.info(
			.Memory,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[ARENA] Frame: %d/%d KB (peak: %d KB) | Path: %d/%d KB (peak: %d KB)",
				ctx.frame_arena.offset / 1024,
				len(ctx.frame_arena_buf) / 1024,
				ctx.frame_arena_peak / 1024,
				ctx.path_arena.offset / 1024,
				len(ctx.path_arena_buf) / 1024,
				ctx.path_arena_peak / 1024,
			),
		)
	}
}

g2d_flush_gpu_pre_pass :: proc() {
	atlas_update_gpu_if_dirty()

	// Gate 3.2: Reset layer RT pool at start of each frame's draw-list replay.
	// The previous frame has been fully rendered to the GPU at this point, so RTs are safe to reuse.
	_g2d_layer_pool_reset()

	// 1. Flush Draw List into vertex/batch arrays
	dl := &renderer.active_draw_list
	MAX_UNIQUE_TARGETS :: 256

	for layer in renderer.Draw_Layer {
		targets: [MAX_UNIQUE_TARGETS]rawptr
		targets_count := 0
		has_screen_target := false

		for cmd_idx in dl.layers[layer] {
			cmd := &dl.commands[cmd_idx]
			common := renderer.draw_command_get_common(cmd)
			if common != nil && !common.flushed {
				if common.target == nil {
					has_screen_target = true
					continue
				}
				
				found := false
				for i in 0..<targets_count {
					if targets[i] == common.target {
						found = true
						break
					}
				}
				if !found && targets_count < MAX_UNIQUE_TARGETS {
					targets[targets_count] = common.target
					targets_count += 1
				}
			}
		}

		for i in 0..<targets_count {
			tgt := cast(^renderer.Render_Target)targets[i]
			if tgt.has_depth {
				pipeline_mgr_activate(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Offscreen)
			} else {
				pipeline_mgr_activate(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .OffscreenNoDepth)
			}
			g2d_draw_list_flush_layer(dl, layer, targets[i])
		}
		
		if has_screen_target {
			pipeline_mgr_activate(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Screen)
			g2d_draw_list_flush_layer(dl, layer, nil)
		}
	}

	// 2. Incremental append to prevented buffer overflow (Sync/Pink Debug)
	// MUST HAPPEN BEFORE ANY RENDERING PASSES so batches have correct gpu_v_offset
	new_vertices := ctx.vertices[ctx.vbuf_appended_count:]
	new_vertex_data_size := i32(len(new_vertices)) * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))
	
	if new_vertex_data_size > 0 {
		off := i32(sg.append_buffer(
			ctx.bind.vertex_buffers[0],
			sg.Range{ptr = &new_vertices[0], size = uint(new_vertex_data_size)},
		))
		
		// Store GPU offsets in all batches that use these new vertices
		for &b in ctx.batches {
			if !b.flushed && !b.gpu_offset_assigned {
				rel_idx := b.v_offset - ctx.vbuf_appended_count
				b.gpu_v_offset = off + rel_idx * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))
				b.gpu_offset_assigned = true
			}
		}
		
		ctx.vbuf_appended_count = i32(len(ctx.vertices))
		ctx.vertices_flushed = true
	}

	// 3. Perform all offscreen passes AFTER vertex upload
	_g2d_flush_offscreen_passes()

	// 4. Execute all pending offscreen shadow blurs
	if len(ctx.pending_blurs) > 0 {
		for &blur_req in ctx.pending_blurs {
			g2d_apply_gaussian_blur(
				&blur_req.target,
				&blur_req.target,
				&blur_req.temp,
				blur_req.radius,
			)
		}
		clear(&ctx.pending_blurs)
	}

	// 5. Gate 3.3: Apply pending image filters (after geometry rendered, before composite-back)
	_g2d_apply_pending_filters()

	// 6. Replay post-effects commands
	g2d_replay_post_effects(dl)
} //end g2d_flush_gpu_pre_pass

// Phase 0: End the drawing frame
// Phase 3.3 updated for correct handling of picture and not exhausting of render ressources
// Phase 10.1.c Beautification: Documentation of invariants; no semantic changes
// Single VBO append for all vertices; render offscreen target groups, then main pass.
g2d_end_frame :: proc() {
	// Screen target is already flushed to batches in g2d_flush_gpu_pre_pass
	_g2d_render_batches_for_target(nil)
	// Gate 3.5: serialise draw list before clearing (no-op when not recording).
	_g2d_record_frame(&renderer.active_draw_list)
	renderer.draw_list_clear(&renderer.active_draw_list)

	// Phase 1B: Performance Diagnostics - RE-ENABLED with safeguards
	// MUST COME BEFORE clear() to capture batch/vertex counts
	when logging.PERF_STATS {
		if ctx.frame_index % 60 == 0 {
			logging.info(
				.Lifecycle,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[PERF] frame=%d batches=%d vertices=%d",
					ctx.frame_index,
					len(ctx.batches),
					len(ctx.vertices),
				),
			)
		}
	}

	clear(&ctx.vertices)
	clear(&ctx.batches)
	ctx.vertices_flushed = false
	// ctx.frame_index += 1 // Removed - frame index now incremented only in g2d_begin_frame
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image
}

// Phase 6: Manual GPU flush for immediate mode rendering.
// This ensures vertices are uploaded and offscreen passes are executed
// even if drawing occurs after the main flushGpuPrePass phase.
g2d_flush_immediate :: proc() {
	if len(ctx.batches) == 0 do return

	has_unflushed := false
	for &b in ctx.batches {
		if !b.flushed {
			has_unflushed = true
			break
		}
	}
	if !has_unflushed do return

	// Phase 6: Incremental upload for immediate mode
	new_vertices := ctx.vertices[ctx.vbuf_appended_count:]
	vertex_data_size := i32(len(new_vertices)) * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))
	
	if vertex_data_size > 0 {
		off := i32(sg.append_buffer(
			ctx.bind.vertex_buffers[0],
			sg.Range{ptr = &new_vertices[0], size = uint(vertex_data_size)},
		))
		
		// Store GPU offsets in all batches that use these new vertices
		for &b in ctx.batches {
			if !b.flushed && !b.gpu_offset_assigned {
				rel_idx := b.v_offset - ctx.vbuf_appended_count
				b.gpu_v_offset = off + rel_idx * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))
				b.gpu_offset_assigned = true
			}
		}
		
		ctx.vbuf_appended_count = i32(len(ctx.vertices))
	}

	// 2. Perform offscreen passes for the newly added geometry
	_g2d_flush_offscreen_passes()
}

@(private)
_g2d_render_batches_for_target :: proc(target: rawptr) {
	start := -1
	for i in 0 ..< len(ctx.batches) {
		b := &ctx.batches[i]
		if b.target == cast(^renderer.Render_Target)target && !b.flushed {
			if start == -1 do start = i
		} else {
			if start != -1 {
				rt := cast(^renderer.Render_Target)target
				_g2d_render_batches(
					ctx.batches[start:i],
					target == nil ? ctx.screen_w : f32(rt.width),
					target == nil ? ctx.screen_h : f32(rt.height),
				)
				start = -1
			}
		}
	}
	if start != -1 {
		rt := cast(^renderer.Render_Target)target
		_g2d_render_batches(
			ctx.batches[start:],
			target == nil ? ctx.screen_w : f32(rt.width),
			target == nil ? ctx.screen_h : f32(rt.height),
		)
	}
}

@(private)
// Phase 10.1.c Beautification: Documentation of invariants; no semantic changes
// Applies per-target screen_size; scissor is applied per-batch (deduped).
_g2d_render_batches :: proc(batches: []G2D_Batch, target_w, target_h: f32) {
	for &b in batches {
		b.flushed = true
	}
	if len(batches) == 0 {
		return
	}

	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.G2D,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[BATCH_RENDER] _g2d_render_batches called with %d batches, current_pass_active=%v, v_total=%d",
				len(batches),
				ctx.current_pass_active,
				len(ctx.vertices),
			),
		)
	}
	// Start with default pipeline
	// CRITICAL: Refresh default pipeline from manager to ensure we match the current active set/format
	ctx.pip = pipeline_mgr_get(&ctx.pipeline_mgr, .Normal)
	curr_pip := ctx.pip

	// Debug: Validate initial pipeline
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.Batching,
			fmt.tprintf("[PIPELINE_INIT] Starting with default pipeline %d", curr_pip.id),
		)
	}

	if !g2d_validate_pipeline_before_use(curr_pip, "initial setup") {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(.Batching, "[PIPELINE_CRITICAL] Default pipeline is invalid!")
			// Try to use fallback - for now just use the default pipeline anyway
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[PIPELINE_RECOVERY] Continuing with potentially invalid pipeline %d",
					curr_pip.id,
				),
			)
		}
	}

	// CRITICAL FIX: Apply initial pipeline and uniforms before any drawing
	// This resolves Sokol validation error: "VALIDATE_DRAW_REQUIRED_BINDINGS_OR_UNIFORMS_MISSING"
	if curr_pip.id != 0 {
		vs_params := shaders.Vs_Params {
			screen_size = {target_w, target_h},
		}
		sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
		sg.apply_uniforms(0, sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)})
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf("[PIPELINE_INIT] Applied initial pipeline %d", curr_pip.id),
			)
		}
	} else {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				"[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Default pipeline is invalid (id=0), cannot render!",
			)
		}
		return // Cannot render without valid pipeline
	}

	// CRITICAL FIX: Add safeguards for rapid window resizing
	// Prevent memory corruption by validating vertex buffer state
	if len(ctx.vertices) == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(.Batching, "[RESIZE_SAFEGUARD] No vertices to render, skipping")
		}
		return
	}

	// Validate vertex buffer capacity
	vertex_data_size := i32(len(ctx.vertices)) * i32(size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex))
	if vertex_data_size > ctx.vbuf_capacity {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[RESIZE_CRISIS] Vertex buffer overflow! Size: %d, Capacity: %d",
					vertex_data_size,
					ctx.vbuf_capacity,
				),
			)
		}
		// Emergency fallback: limit rendering to available capacity
		max_vertices := ctx.vbuf_capacity / size_of(renderer.G2D_Vertex)
		if max_vertices > 0 {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf("[RESIZE_RECOVERY] Limiting to %d vertices", max_vertices),
				)
			}
			// This is a critical error that should be investigated
			// For now, we'll try to continue with limited vertices
		} else {
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(.Batching, "[RESIZE_FATAL] No capacity available, cannot render!")
			}
			return
		}
	}

	// Apply pipeline - be more permissive to allow rendering to proceed
	if curr_pip.id != 0 {
		sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
		// CRITICAL FIX: Add initial apply_bindings for robustness
		ctx.bind.views[shaders.VIEW_tex] = ctx.white_view
		ctx.bind.samplers[shaders.SMP_smp] = ctx.smp
		sg.apply_bindings(ctx.bind)
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[RENDER_START] Main pass started with pipeline %d, %d batches",
					curr_pip.id,
					len(batches),
				),
			)
		}
	} else {
		// CRITICAL FIX: Remove pipeline creation from render loop
		// Pipeline creation belongs in initialization only
		logging.error(
			.G2D,
			"[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Default pipeline invalid at render start. " +
			"This indicates an init failure — cannot render this frame.",
		)
		return // Cannot render without valid pipeline
	}

	w, h := math.max(target_w, 1.0), math.max(target_h, 1.0)
	vs_params := shaders.Vs_Params {
		screen_size = {w, h},
	}
	// Initial uniform apply
	sg.apply_uniforms(0, sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)})

	// Phase 10.1.d: dedupe scissor state changes within the pass (no visual change)
	have_scissor := false
	last_on := false
	last_rx, last_ry, last_rw, last_rh: i32 = 0, 0, 0, 0

	// Debug: Track batch processing
	b_index := 0
	batch_count := 0

	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.Batching,
			fmt.tprintf("[BATCH_PROCESS] Starting batch processing with %d batches", len(batches)),
		)
	}

	// Phase 2: Batch Merging - Conditionally merge compatible batches to reduce draw calls
	batches_to_process := batches
	when config.BATCH_MERGING_ENABLED {
		when logging.DEBUG {

			// fmt.println("[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] BATCH_MERGING_ENABLED is TRUE, batch count:", len(batches))
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] BATCH_MERGING_ENABLED is TRUE, batch count: %d",
					len(batches),
				),
			)
		}
		if len(batches) > 0 && len(batches) < 1000 { 	// Safety limits
			when logging.DEBUG {
				//fmt.println("[BATCH_MERGE_DEBUG] Before merge:", len(batches), "batches")
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf("[BATCH_MERGE_DEBUG] Before merge: %d batches", len(batches)),
				)
			}
			batches_to_process = merge_batches(batches)
			when logging.DEBUG {
				//fmt.println("[BATCH_MERGE_DEBUG] After merge:", len(batches_to_process), "batches")
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[BATCH_MERGE_DEBUG] After merge: %d batches",
						len(batches_to_process),
					),
				)
			}

			when logging.PERF_G2D {
				original_count := len(batches)
				merged_count := len(batches_to_process)
				reduction := 0
				if original_count > 0 {
					reduction = 100 - (merged_count * 100) / original_count
				}
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[BATCH_MERGE] Original: %d batches, Merged: %d batches (%d%% reduction)",
						original_count,
						merged_count,
						reduction,
					),
				)
			}
		} else {
			when logging.DEBUG {
				// fmt.println("[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] Skipping merge - batch count out of range:", len(batches))
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] Skipping merge - batch count out of range: %d",
						len(batches),
					),
				)
			}
		}
	} else {
		when logging.DEBUG {
			// fmt.println("[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] BATCH_MERGING_ENABLED is FALSE")
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf("[BATCH_MERGE_STATUS] BATCH_MERGING_ENABLED is FALSE"),
			)
		}
	}

	for b in batches_to_process {
		// Gate 4.1: instanced particle batches have v_count=0; handle them separately.
		if b.is_instanced {
			if b.instance_count > 0 && b.pipeline.id != 0 {
				// Apply this batch's scissor before drawing.
				if b.scissor_on {
					sg.apply_scissor_rect(i32(b.scissor.x), i32(b.scissor.y), i32(b.scissor.z), i32(b.scissor.w), true)
				} else {
					sg.apply_scissor_rect(0, 0, i32(w), i32(h), true)
				}
				sg.apply_pipeline(b.pipeline)
				inst_vs := shaders.Vs_Params_Particle{screen_size = {w, h}}
				sg.apply_uniforms(shaders.UB_vs_params_particle, sg.Range{ptr = &inst_vs, size = size_of(inst_vs)})
				inst_bind := sg.Bindings{}
				inst_bind.vertex_buffers[0] = ctx.particle_template_buf
				inst_bind.vertex_buffers[1] = ctx.particle_inst_buf
				inst_bind.vertex_buffer_offsets[1] = b.inst_buf_offset
				sg.apply_bindings(inst_bind)
				sg.draw(0, 6, b.instance_count)
				// Restore regular pipeline + bindings for subsequent batches.
				sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
				sg.apply_uniforms(0, sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)})
				ctx.bind.views[shaders.VIEW_tex] = ctx.white_view
				ctx.bind.samplers[shaders.SMP_smp] = ctx.smp
				sg.apply_bindings(ctx.bind)
			}
			continue
		}

		if b.v_count <= 0 do continue

		batch_count += 1

		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[BATCH_PROCESS] Processing batch %d with v_count=%d, pipeline=%d",
					b_index,
					b.v_count,
					b.pipeline.id,
				),
			)
		}
		b_index += 1

		// Phase 11: Switch pipeline if needed
		if b.pipeline.id != 0 && b.pipeline.id != curr_pip.id {
			// Debug: Track pipeline switches
			when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
				logging.debug(
					.Batching,
					fmt.tprintf(
						"[PIPELINE_SWITCH] Switching from pipeline %d to %d (batch v_count=%d)",
						curr_pip.id,
						b.pipeline.id,
						b.v_count,
					),
				)
			}
			curr_pip = b.pipeline

			// Debug: Validate pipeline before applying
			if !g2d_validate_pipeline_before_use(curr_pip, "batch rendering") {
				curr_pip = ctx.pip // Fallback to default pipeline
				when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
					logging.debug(
						.Batching,
						fmt.tprintf(
							"[PIPELINE_FALLBACK] Using default pipeline %d instead of invalid pipeline %d",
							curr_pip.id,
							b.pipeline.id,
						),
					)
				}
			}

			// Critical fix: Only apply pipeline if it's valid
			if curr_pip.id != 0 {
				sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
				// Re-apply uniforms for the new pipeline
				sg.apply_uniforms(
					0,
					sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)},
				)
			} else {
				// Fallback to default pipeline if current is invalid
				curr_pip = ctx.pip
				if curr_pip.id != 0 {
					sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
					sg.apply_uniforms(
						0,
						sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)},
					)
				} else {
					// Emergency fallback - skip this batch
					when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
						logging.debug(
							.Batching,
							"[PIPELINE_CRISIS] Both current and default pipelines are invalid! Skipping batch",
						)
					}
					continue
				}
			}
		}

		// Phase 6: Sync/Pink Flush Fix - use absolute GPU byte offset from batch
		ctx.bind.vertex_buffer_offsets[0] = b.gpu_v_offset

		view: sg.View
		if b.image == ctx.white_image {
			view = ctx.white_view
		} else {
			if v, ok := ctx.image_views[b.image.id]; ok && v.id != 0 {
				view = v
			} else {
				view = sg.make_view({texture = {image = b.image}})
				ctx.image_views[b.image.id] = view
			}
		}

		// Desired scissor for this batch (default covers full target)
		des_on := b.scissor_on
		rx, ry, rw, rh: i32
		if des_on {
			rx = i32(
				b.scissor.x,
			); ry = i32(b.scissor.y); rw = i32(b.scissor.z); rh = i32(b.scissor.w)
		} else {
			rx = 0; ry = 0; rw = i32(w); rh = i32(h)
		}
		if !have_scissor ||
		   des_on != last_on ||
		   rx != last_rx ||
		   ry != last_ry ||
		   rw != last_rw ||
		   rh != last_rh {
			if des_on {
				when logging.DEBUG_G2D {
					fmt.printf(
						"[SCISSOR_FLUSH] idx=%d on=true rx=%d ry=%d rw=%d rh=%d\n",
						b_index,
						rx,
						ry,
						rw,
						rh,
					)
				}
			} else {
				when logging.DEBUG_G2D {
					fmt.printf("[SCISSOR_FLUSH] idx=%d on=false rw=%d rh=%d\n", b_index, rw, rh)
				}}
			sg.apply_scissor_rect(rx, ry, rw, rh, true)
			have_scissor = true
			last_on = des_on
			last_rx, last_ry, last_rw, last_rh = rx, ry, rw, rh
		}

		ctx.bind.views[shaders.VIEW_tex] = view
		// Phase 10.4.b: bind per-batch sampler
		ctx.bind.samplers[shaders.SMP_smp] = b.sampler
		sg.apply_bindings(ctx.bind)

		// CRITICAL FIX: Prevent excessively large stencil batches that cause crashes
		// Note: Increased limit from 100,000 to 500,000 for complex SVGs like the Tiger.
		if b.is_stencil_batch && b.v_count > 500000 {
			logging.warn(
				.G2D,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[STENCIL_LARGE] Unusually large stencil batch: %d vertices",
					b.v_count,
				),
			)
			// Continue rendering instead of skipping - trust the buffer capacity checks
		}

		// Phase 10D.2.4: Handle stencil batches
		if b.is_stencil_batch {
			// Execute the stencil fill operation using PRE-CALCULATED bounds and params
			_g2d_fill_path_stencil_for_batch(
				b,
				b.min_x,
				b.min_y,
				b.max_x,
				b.max_y,
				b.dx,
				b.dy,
				b.size,
				&vs_params,
			)

			// CRITICAL FIX: Restore pipeline state after stencil operations
			if curr_pip.id != 0 {
				sg.apply_pipeline(curr_pip)
				sg.apply_uniforms(
					0,
					sg.Range{ptr = &vs_params, size = size_of(shaders.Vs_Params)},
				)
			}
			continue
		} else {
			// Regular batch drawing with resize safeguards
			if b.v_count > 0 &&
			   b.v_offset >= 0 &&
			   i32(b.v_offset) + b.v_count <= i32(len(ctx.vertices)) {
				// SDF batches require per-shape params at FS uniform slot 1.
				if b.use_sdf_params {
					sdf_vs := shaders.Sdf_Vs_Params{screen_size = {w, h}}
					sdf_fs := b.sdf_params // copy to local for addressability
					sg.apply_uniforms(0, sg.Range{ptr = &sdf_vs, size = size_of(shaders.Sdf_Vs_Params)})
					sg.apply_uniforms(1, sg.Range{ptr = &sdf_fs, size = size_of(shaders.Sdf_Fs_Params)})
				}
				sg.draw(0, b.v_count, 1)
			} else {
				when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
					logging.debug(
						.G2D,
						fmt.tprintf(
							"[RESIZE_SAFEGUARD] Skipping invalid regular batch: offset=%d, count=%d, total=%d",
							b.v_offset,
							b.v_count,
							len(ctx.vertices),
						),
					)
				}
			}
		}
	}

	// Debug: Summary of batch processing
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(
			.Batching,
			fmt.tprintf(
				"[BATCH_SUMMARY] Processed %d batches out of %d total batches",
				batch_count,
				len(batches),
			),
		)
	}

	// Always log if no batches were processed (critical issue)
	if batch_count == 0 && len(batches) > 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(
				.Batching,
				fmt.tprintf(
					"[RENDER_CRITICAL] No batches processed! %d batches had zero vertex count",
					len(batches),
				),
			)
		}
	} else if batch_count == 0 {
		when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
			logging.debug(.Batching, "[RENDER_INFO] No batches to process (empty frame)")
		}
	}
}

//Phase 0: Set color for a draw operation
g2d_set_color :: proc(r, g, b, a: f32) {ctx.curr_color = {r, g, b, a}}

//Phase 2.4 add draw points

g2d_fill_circle_simple :: proc(x, y, radius: f32, color: [4]f32) {
	g2d_fill_circle_immediate(x, y, radius, renderer.paint_solid(color))
}

g2d_draw_line_immediate :: proc(
	x1, y1, x2, y2, thickness: f32,
	color: [4]f32 = {0, 0, 0, 0},
	lineCap: renderer.Line_Cap = .Butt,
) {
	if thickness <= 0 do return
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image

	b := get_batch()
	c := resolve_color(color)
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		if color == {0, 0, 0, 0} {
			logging.debug(
				.G2D,
				fmt.tprintf("[TEXT_COLOR] default-param used; resolved curr_color=%v", c),
			)
		}
	}
	dx, dy := x2 - x1, y2 - y1
	d := math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
	if d == 0 do return

	lx, ly := dx / d, dy / d
	nx, ny := -ly * thickness * 0.5, lx * thickness * 0.5

	ex, ey: f32 = 0, 0
	if lineCap == .Square || lineCap == .Round {
		ex, ey = lx * thickness * 0.5, ly * thickness * 0.5
	}

	p1 := apply_transform(x1 - ex + nx, y1 - ey + ny)
	p2 := apply_transform(x2 + ex + nx, y2 + ey + ny)
	p3 := apply_transform(x2 + ex - nx, y2 + ey - ny)
	p4 := apply_transform(x1 - ex - nx, y1 - ey - ny)

	v1 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p1, {0, 0}, c}
	v2 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p2, {1, 0}, c}
	v3 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p3, {1, 1}, c}
	v4 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p4, {0, 1}, c}

	add_vertices(b, v1, v2, v3, v1, v3, v4)

	if lineCap == .Round {
		segments := 12
		radius := thickness * 0.5

		center1 := apply_transform(x1, y1)
		start_angle := math.atan2(ny, nx)
		for i in 0 ..< segments {
			t1 := start_angle + (f32(i) * math.PI / f32(segments))
			t2 := start_angle + (f32(i + 1) * math.PI / f32(segments))
			tp1 := apply_transform(x1 + radius * math.cos(t1), y1 + radius * math.sin(t1))
			tp2 := apply_transform(x1 + radius * math.cos(t2), y1 + radius * math.sin(t2))

			add_vertices(
				b,
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{center1, {0.5, 0.5}, c},
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{tp1, {0, 0}, c},
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{tp2, {0, 0}, c},
			)
		}

		center2 := apply_transform(x2, y2)
		end_angle := math.atan2(-ny, -nx)
		for i in 0 ..< segments {
			t1 := end_angle + (f32(i) * math.PI / f32(segments))
			t2 := end_angle + (f32(i + 1) * math.PI / f32(segments))
			tp1 := apply_transform(x2 + radius * math.cos(t1), y2 + radius * math.sin(t1))
			tp2 := apply_transform(x2 + radius * math.cos(t2), y2 + radius * math.sin(t2))

			add_vertices(
				b,
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{center2, {0.5, 0.5}, c},
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{tp1, {0, 0}, c},
				renderer.G2D_Vertex{tp2, {0, 0}, c},
			)
		}
	}
}

// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Shared Paint Helpers
// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


//Phase 0: primitive for rectangles
g2d_fill_rect_immediate :: proc(
	x, y, w, h: f32,
	paint: renderer.Paint,
	shadow: renderer.Shadow = {},
) {
	when logging.DEBUG_VERTICES {
		logging.debug(.G2D, fmt.tprintf("[G2D_FILL_RECT] x=%.1f y=%.1f w=%.1f h=%.1f", x, y, w, h))
	}
	if shadow.blur > 0 || shadow.offset != {0, 0} {
		// Handled by renderer_backend if supported, or we can add a fallback shadow quad here
		// For now we'll just implement the fill.
	}
	// Shadow Pass
	if shadow.blur > 0 || shadow.offset.x != 0 || shadow.offset.y != 0 {
		// Simple shadow rect: can use g2d_draw_shadowed_rect logic if available
		// Or separate call. For now, skipping explicit shadow impl inside primitive to keep diff small.
		// TODO: Implement shadow rendering
	}

	if paint.type == .Image || paint.type == .Pattern {
		ctx.curr_image = handle_to_sg_image(paint.image)
	} else {
		ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image
	}

	b := get_batch()

	p1 := apply_transform(x, y)
	p2 := apply_transform(x + w, y)
	p3 := apply_transform(x + w, y + h)
	p4 := apply_transform(x, y + h)

	c0 := g2d_resolve_paint_color(x, y, paint)
	c1 := g2d_resolve_paint_color(x + w, y, paint)
	c2 := g2d_resolve_paint_color(x + w, y + h, paint)
	c3 := g2d_resolve_paint_color(x, y + h, paint)

	// UVs (todo: map for pattern)
	uv0 := [2]f32{0, 0}
	uv1 := [2]f32{1, 0}
	uv2 := [2]f32{1, 1}
	uv3 := [2]f32{0, 1}

	v1 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p1, uv0, c0}
	v2 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p2, uv1, c1}
	v3 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p3, uv2, c2}
	v4 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p4, uv3, c3}

	add_vertices(b, v1, v2, v3, v1, v3, v4)
}

// Phase 6: Foundation for gradients - Multi-color rect helper
g2d_fill_rect_multi_color :: proc(x, y, w, h: f32, c0, c1, c2, c3: [4]f32) {
	ctx.curr_image = ctx.white_image
	b := get_batch()

	p1 := apply_transform(x, y)
	p2 := apply_transform(x + w, y)
	p3 := apply_transform(x + w, y + h)
	p4 := apply_transform(x, y + h)

	v1 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p1, {0, 0}, c0}
	v2 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p2, {1, 0}, c1}
	v3 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p3, {1, 1}, c2}
	v4 := renderer.G2D_Vertex{p4, {0, 1}, c3}

	add_vertices(b, v1, v2, v3, v1, v3, v4)
}

// Phase 6: Multi-Color and Gradient Rects removed in favor of Paint struct
