// Gate 3.5: Draw-list recording and replay for golden-image CI regression testing.
//
// Binary format
// ─────────────
//   Header (6 bytes):  magic[4]="RSRC"  +  version(u16le)=1
//   Per-frame:         frame_id(u32le)  +  cmd_count(u32le)  +  N×command
//   Per-command:       tag(u8)  +  payload_size(u32le)  +  payload_bytes
//                      payload_size=0  ⟹  non-serializable command (skip on replay)
//
// Non-serializable (written as skip / size=0):
//   Cmd_Begin_Pass           — sg.Pass carries GPU handles + cstring
//   Cmd_Apply_Box_Blur/Bloom/Vignette — hold ^Render_Target pointers
//   Cmd_GPU_Callback         — carries a function pointer
//   Cmd_Draw_Render_Target   — carries ^Render_Target pointer
//   Cmd_Draw_Text_Layout     — nested Visual_Line slices (complex)

import renderer "project:renderer"
import assets "project:assets"
import vfs "project:vfs"

// ── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

RECORD_MAGIC   :: [4]u8{'R', 'S', 'R', 'C'}
RECORD_VERSION :: u16(1)

// Command tags — assigned by position in the Draw_Command union.
_Cmd_Tag :: enum u8 {
	Draw_Render_Target    = 1,   // skip
	Draw_Text_Layout      = 2,   // skip
	Draw_Text_On_Path     = 3,
	Fill_Rect             = 4,
	Fill_Rect_Rounded     = 5,
	Draw_Rect             = 6,
	Draw_Rect_Rounded     = 7,
	Draw_Line             = 8,
	Draw_Circle           = 9,
	Fill_Circle           = 10,
	Draw_Ellipse          = 11,
	Fill_Ellipse          = 12,
	Fill_Triangle         = 13,
	Draw_Triangle         = 14,
	Draw_Polyline         = 15,
	Fill_Polygon          = 16,
	Draw_Polygon          = 17,
	Fill_Pie              = 18,
	Draw_Arc              = 19,
	Fill_Arc              = 20,
	Fill_Star             = 21,
	Draw_Star             = 22,
	Fill_Ring             = 23,
	Draw_Ring             = 24,
	Fill_Wedge            = 25,
	Draw_Wedge            = 26,
	Draw_Point            = 27,
	Draw_Point_Scale      = 28,
	Draw_Text             = 29,
	Draw_Text_Advanced    = 30,
	Draw_Asset            = 31,
	Draw_Image            = 32,
	Draw_Image_Rect       = 33,
	Draw_Image_Rect_UV    = 34,
	Shadow_Rect           = 35,
	Shadow_Circle         = 36,
	Shadow_Ngon           = 37,
	Shadow_Silhouette     = 38,
	Inset_Shadow_Rect     = 39,
	Fill_Bezier_Quad      = 40,
	Fill_Bezier_Cubic     = 41,
	Draw_Bezier_Quad      = 42,
	Draw_Bezier_Cubic     = 43,
	Begin_Pass            = 44,  // skip
	End_Pass              = 45,
	Path_Fill             = 46,
	Path_Draw             = 47,
	Path_Stroke           = 48,
	Draw_Ngon             = 49,
	Stroke_Gradient       = 50,
	Set_Clip              = 51,
	Reset_Clip            = 52,
	Push_Matrix           = 53,
	Pop_Matrix            = 54,
	Identity_Matrix       = 55,
	Translate             = 56,
	Rotate                = 57,
	Scale                 = 58,
	Apply_Matrix          = 59,
	Apply_Matrix4         = 60,
	Begin_Mask            = 61,
	End_Mask              = 62,
	Begin_Masked_Draw     = 63,
	End_Masked_Draw       = 64,
	Apply_Box_Blur        = 65,  // skip
	Apply_Bloom           = 66,  // skip
	Apply_Vignette        = 67,  // skip
	GPU_Callback          = 68,  // skip
	// Gate 3.2: layer commands carry RT pointers — serialized as skip markers
	Push_Layer            = 69,  // skip
	Pop_Layer             = 70,  // skip
	// Gate 3.3: filter commands carry RT pointers — serialized as skip markers
	Set_Filter            = 71,  // skip
	Clear_Filter          = 72,  // skip
}

// ── Module state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@(private)
_Rec_State :: struct {
	file:   _Rec_File_Handle,
	active: bool,
	frame:  u32,
}
@(private)
_rec: _Rec_State

// ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// g2d_begin_record opens `path` for writing and enables per-frame draw-list
// serialisation.  Returns false if the file cannot be created or recording is
// already active.
g2d_begin_record :: proc(path: string) -> bool {
	if _rec.active do return false
	f, ok := _rec_file_open(path)
	if !ok do return false
	_rec.file   = f
	_rec.active = true
	_rec.frame  = 0
	magic := RECORD_MAGIC
	_fw(f, magic[:])
	_fw_u16(f, RECORD_VERSION)
	return true
}

// g2d_end_record closes the current recording.
g2d_end_record :: proc() {
	if !_rec.active do return
	_rec_file_close(_rec.file)
	_rec.active = false
}

// g2d_replay reads a recording file produced by g2d_begin_record/g2d_end_record
// and pushes all serialised commands back into the active draw list.
// Non-serialisable commands (skip markers) are silently omitted.
// Returns false if the file cannot be read or the header is invalid.
// Slices/strings in replayed commands are allocated from `context.temp_allocator`.
g2d_replay :: proc(path: string) -> bool {
	data, ok := vfs.loadAsset(path, .Settings)
	if !ok do return false
	defer delete(data) // free as soon as replay is done; loadAsset uses context.allocator

	r := _Reader{data = data, ok = true}

	magic: [4]u8
	_rr_bytes(&r, magic[:])
	if !r.ok || magic != RECORD_MAGIC do return false
	version := _rr_u16(&r)
	if !r.ok || version != RECORD_VERSION do return false

	for r.ok && r.pos < len(r.data) {
		_frame_id := _rr_u32(&r)
		cmd_count  := _rr_u32(&r)
		if !r.ok do break
		_ = _frame_id
		for i in 0 ..< int(cmd_count) {
			tag     := _rr_u8(&r)
			payload := _rr_u32(&r)
			if !r.ok do break
			if payload == 0 {
				continue // skip marker
			}
			end_pos := r.pos + int(payload)
			cmd, cmd_ok := _decode_cmd(&r, _Cmd_Tag(tag))
			if cmd_ok {
				renderer.draw_list_push(&renderer.active_draw_list, cmd)
			}
			r.pos = end_pos // consume exactly payload bytes
		}
	}
	return r.ok
}

// g2d_replay_frame replays a single recorded frame from pre-loaded data.
// `data` must be the full recording bytes returned by vfs.loadAsset; the caller
// owns its lifetime and should load it once (on entering playback) and free it
// when done. `frame_index` is 0-based. Returns false when frame_index is at or
// beyond the end of the recording — callers should then reset their counter to 0
// to loop. Slices/strings in replayed commands are allocated from `context.temp_allocator`.
g2d_replay_frame :: proc(data: []u8, frame_index: int) -> bool {
	r := _Reader{data = data, ok = true}

	magic: [4]u8
	_rr_bytes(&r, magic[:])
	if !r.ok || magic != RECORD_MAGIC do return false
	version := _rr_u16(&r)
	if !r.ok || version != RECORD_VERSION do return false

	// Skip frames before frame_index: read cmd count and jump over payload bytes.
	for frame := 0; frame < frame_index && r.ok && r.pos < len(r.data); frame += 1 {
		_ = _rr_u32(&r)                  // frame_id
		cmd_count := int(_rr_u32(&r))
		if !r.ok do break
		for i in 0 ..< cmd_count {
			_ = _rr_u8(&r)               // tag
			payload := int(_rr_u32(&r))
			r.pos += payload             // skip without decoding
		}
	}

	if !r.ok || r.pos >= len(r.data) do return false

	// Replay only the target frame.
	_ = _rr_u32(&r)                  // frame_id
	cmd_count := int(_rr_u32(&r))
	if !r.ok do return false

	for i in 0 ..< cmd_count {
		tag     := _rr_u8(&r)
		payload := _rr_u32(&r)
		if !r.ok do break
		if payload == 0 { continue }
		end_pos := r.pos + int(payload)
		cmd, cmd_ok := _decode_cmd(&r, _Cmd_Tag(tag))
		if cmd_ok {
			renderer.draw_list_push(&renderer.active_draw_list, cmd)
		}
		r.pos = end_pos
	}

	return r.ok
}

// ── Internal: per-frame serialisation ────────────────────────────────────────

// Called from g2d_end_frame before draw_list_clear.
@(private)
_g2d_record_frame :: proc(dl: ^renderer.Draw_List) {
	if !_rec.active do return
	f := _rec.file
	_fw_u32(f, _rec.frame)
	_rec.frame += 1
	_fw_u32(f, u32(len(dl.commands)))

	buf := make([dynamic]u8, 0, 4096, context.temp_allocator)
	for cmd in dl.commands {
		clear(&buf)
		tag, has_payload := _encode_cmd(&buf, cmd)
		_fw_u8(f, u8(tag))
		if has_payload && len(buf) > 0 {
			_fw_u32(f, u32(len(buf)))
			_fw(f, buf[:])
		} else {
			_fw_u32(f, 0)
		}
	}
}

// ── Encode ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@(private)
_encode_cmd :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, cmd: renderer.Draw_Command) -> (tag: _Cmd_Tag, ok: bool) {
	switch c in cmd {
	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Render_Target:
		return .Draw_Render_Target, false // skip

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text_Layout:
		return .Draw_Text_Layout, false // skip

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text_On_Path:
		_bw_common(b, c.common)
		_bw_str(b, c.text)
		_bw_u32(b, c.font.id)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color)
		_bw_path_pts(b, c.points)
		return .Draw_Text_On_Path, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Rect:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Rect, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Rect_Rounded:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.radius)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Rect_Rounded, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Rect:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Rect, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Rect_Rounded:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Rect_Rounded, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Line:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.cap)); return .Draw_Line, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Circle:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Circle, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Circle:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Circle, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ellipse:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.rx); _bw_f32(b, c.ry); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Ellipse, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Ellipse:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.rx); _bw_f32(b, c.ry)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Ellipse, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Triangle:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2); _bw_f32(b, c.x3); _bw_f32(b, c.y3)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Triangle, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Triangle:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2); _bw_f32(b, c.x3); _bw_f32(b, c.y3); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Triangle, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Polyline:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_pts2(b, c.points); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.lineCap)); return .Draw_Polyline, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Polygon:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_pts2(b, c.points); _bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Polygon, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Polygon:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_pts2(b, c.points); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness); _bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Polygon, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Pie:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.start_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.end_angle)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Pie, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Arc:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.start_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.end_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.cap)); return .Draw_Arc, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Arc:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.start_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.end_angle)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Arc, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Star:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_u32(b, u32(c.num_points)); _bw_f32(b, c.inner_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.outer_radius)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Star, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Star:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_u32(b, u32(c.num_points)); _bw_f32(b, c.inner_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.outer_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Star, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Ring:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.inner_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.outer_radius)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Ring, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ring:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y)
		_bw_f32(b, c.inner_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.inner_thickness); _bw_v4(b, c.inner_color)
		_bw_f32(b, c.outer_radius); _bw_f32(b, c.outer_thickness); _bw_v4(b, c.outer_color)
		return .Draw_Ring, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Wedge:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.start_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.end_angle)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); _bw_bool(b, c.clockwise); return .Fill_Wedge, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Wedge:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness); _bw_f32(b, c.start_angle); _bw_f32(b, c.end_angle)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_bool(b, c.clockwise); return .Draw_Wedge, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Point:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Point, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Point_Scale:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Point_Scale, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_str(b, c.text); _bw_u32(b, c.font.id); _bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, transmute(u8)c.mods)
		return .Draw_Text, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text_Advanced:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_str(b, c.text); _bw_u32(b, c.font.id)
		for fh in c.fallbacks { _bw_u32(b, fh.id) }
		_bw_u32(b, u32(c.n_fallbacks)); _bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, transmute(u8)c.mods)
		return .Draw_Text_Advanced, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Asset:
		_bw_common(b, c.common)
		_bw_u32(b, c.handle.id); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.handle.asset_type)); _bw_i64(b, c.handle.timestamp)
		_bw_f32(b, c.config.x); _bw_f32(b, c.config.y); _bw_f32(b, c.config.width); _bw_f32(b, c.config.height)
		_bw_bool(b, c.config.allow_sync_fallback); _bw_v4(b, c.config.tint_color); _bw_f32(b, c.config.opacity); _bw_bool(b, c.config.preserve_aspect)
		return .Draw_Asset, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_u32(b, c.img.id); _bw_v4(b, c.color)
		return .Draw_Image, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image_Rect:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_v4(b, c.dest); _bw_v4(b, c.src); _bw_u32(b, c.img.id); _bw_v4(b, c.color)
		return .Draw_Image_Rect, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image_Rect_UV_Mat:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_u32(b, c.mat.image.id); _bw_v4(b, c.mat.tint); _bw_v4(b, c.dest); _bw_v4(b, c.uvs); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.filter)); _bw_bool(b, c.repeat); _bw_bool(b, c.mipmap)
		return .Draw_Image_Rect_UV, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Rect:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_x); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_y); _bw_f32(b, c.blur)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Shadow_Rect, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Circle:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.cx); _bw_f32(b, c.cy); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_x); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_y); _bw_f32(b, c.blur)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Shadow_Circle, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Ngon:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.cx); _bw_f32(b, c.cy); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_u32(b, u32(c.sides)); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_x); _bw_f32(b, c.offset_y); _bw_f32(b, c.blur)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Shadow_Ngon, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Silhouette:
		_bw_common(b, c.common)
		_bw_u8(b, c.key.kind); _bw_f32(b, c.key.w); _bw_f32(b, c.key.h); _bw_f32(b, c.key.r)
		_bw_u32(b, u32(c.key.sides)); _bw_f32(b, c.key.offset_x); _bw_f32(b, c.key.offset_y); _bw_f32(b, c.key.blur)
		_bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_v4(b, c.color)
		return .Shadow_Silhouette, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Inset_Shadow_Rect:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); _bw_f32(b, c.top_depth); _bw_f32(b, c.side_depth); _bw_v4(b, c.color)
		return .Inset_Shadow_Rect, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Bezier_Quadratic:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.cx); _bw_f32(b, c.cy); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Bezier_Quad, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Fill_Bezier_Cubic:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.c1x); _bw_f32(b, c.c1y); _bw_f32(b, c.c2x); _bw_f32(b, c.c2y); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2)
		_bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Fill_Bezier_Cubic, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Bezier_Quadratic:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.cx); _bw_f32(b, c.cy); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Bezier_Quad, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Bezier_Cubic:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x1); _bw_f32(b, c.y1); _bw_f32(b, c.c1x); _bw_f32(b, c.c1y); _bw_f32(b, c.c2x); _bw_f32(b, c.c2y); _bw_f32(b, c.x2); _bw_f32(b, c.y2); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness)
		_bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Bezier_Cubic, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Begin_Pass:
		return .Begin_Pass, false // skip — sg.Pass carries GPU handles

	case renderer.Cmd_End_Pass:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .End_Pass, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Path_Fill:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_path_pts(b, c.points); _bw_paint(b, c.paint); return .Path_Fill, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Path_Draw:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_path_pts(b, c.points); _bw_f32(b, c.thickness); _bw_v4(b, c.color); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.join)); _bw_u8(b, u8(c.cap)); return .Path_Draw, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Path_Stroke:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_path_pts(b, c.points); _bw_stroke(b, c.stroke); return .Path_Stroke, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ngon:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.cx); _bw_f32(b, c.cy); _bw_f32(b, c.radius); _bw_u32(b, u32(c.sides)); _bw_v4(b, c.color); return .Draw_Ngon, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Stroke_Gradient:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_pts2(b, c.points); _bw_paint(b, c.paint); _bw_f32(b, c.width)
		_bw_bool(b, c.options.edge_lines); _bw_v4(b, c.options.edge_color); _bw_f32(b, c.options.edge_width)
		return .Stroke_Gradient, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Set_Clip:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.x); _bw_f32(b, c.y); _bw_f32(b, c.w); _bw_f32(b, c.h); return .Set_Clip, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Reset_Clip:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Reset_Clip, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Push_Matrix:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Push_Matrix, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Pop_Matrix:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Pop_Matrix, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Identity_Matrix:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Identity_Matrix, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Translate:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.dx); _bw_f32(b, c.dy); return .Translate, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Rotate:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.angle); return .Rotate, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Scale:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_f32(b, c.sx); _bw_f32(b, c.sy); return .Scale, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Apply_Matrix:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_mat3(b, c.m); return .Apply_Matrix, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Apply_Matrix4:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); _bw_mat4(b, c.m); return .Apply_Matrix4, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Begin_Mask:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Begin_Mask, true

	case renderer.Cmd_End_Mask:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .End_Mask, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Begin_Masked_Draw:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .Begin_Masked_Draw, true

	case renderer.Cmd_End_Masked_Draw:
		_bw_common(b, c.common); return .End_Masked_Draw, true

	case renderer.Cmd_Apply_Box_Blur:
		return .Apply_Box_Blur, false // skip — ^Render_Target pointers

	case renderer.Cmd_Apply_Bloom:
		return .Apply_Bloom, false // skip — ^Render_Target pointers

	case renderer.Cmd_Apply_Vignette:
		return .Apply_Vignette, false // skip — ^Render_Target pointers

	case renderer.Cmd_GPU_Callback:
		return .GPU_Callback, false // skip — function pointer

	case renderer.Cmd_Push_Layer:
		return .Push_Layer, false // skip — RT pointers resolved at runtime

	case renderer.Cmd_Pop_Layer:
		return .Pop_Layer, false // skip

	case renderer.Cmd_Set_Filter:
		return .Set_Filter, false // skip — RT pointers resolved at runtime

	case renderer.Cmd_Clear_Filter:
		return .Clear_Filter, false // skip

	case renderer.Cmd_Draw_Particles_Instanced:
		return .Fill_Rect, false // skip — instance data is transient GPU memory
	}
	return .Fill_Rect, false
}

// ── Decode ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@(private)
_decode_cmd :: proc(r: ^_Reader, tag: _Cmd_Tag) -> (cmd: renderer.Draw_Command, ok: bool) {
	switch tag {
	case .Draw_Render_Target, .Draw_Text_Layout, .Begin_Pass,
	     .Apply_Box_Blur, .Apply_Bloom, .Apply_Vignette, .GPU_Callback,
	     .Push_Layer, .Pop_Layer, .Set_Filter, .Clear_Filter:
		return nil, false

	case .Draw_Text_On_Path:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text_On_Path
		c.common = _rr_common(r)
		c.text   = _rr_str(r)
		c.font   = renderer.Font_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}
		c.color  = _rr_v4(r)
		c.points = _rr_path_pts(r)
		return c, true

	case .Fill_Rect:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Rect
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Rect_Rounded:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Rect_Rounded
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Rect:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Rect
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Rect_Rounded:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Rect_Rounded
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Line:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Line
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.cap = renderer.Line_Cap(_rr_u8(r)); return c, true

	case .Draw_Circle:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Circle
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Circle:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Circle
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Ellipse:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ellipse
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.rx = _rr_f32(r); c.ry = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Ellipse:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Ellipse
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.rx = _rr_f32(r); c.ry = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Triangle:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Triangle
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r); c.x3 = _rr_f32(r); c.y3 = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Triangle:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Triangle
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r); c.x3 = _rr_f32(r); c.y3 = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Polyline:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Polyline
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_pts2(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.lineCap = renderer.Line_Cap(_rr_u8(r)); return c, true

	case .Fill_Polygon:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Polygon
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_pts2(r); c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Polygon:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Polygon
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_pts2(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Pie:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Pie
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.start_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.end_angle = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Arc:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Arc
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.start_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.end_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.cap = renderer.Line_Cap(_rr_u8(r)); return c, true

	case .Fill_Arc:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Arc
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.start_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.end_angle = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Star:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Star
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.num_points = int(_rr_u32(r)); c.inner_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.outer_radius = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Star:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Star
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.num_points = int(_rr_u32(r)); c.inner_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.outer_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Ring:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Ring
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.inner_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.outer_radius = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Ring:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ring
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r)
		c.inner_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.inner_thickness = _rr_f32(r); c.inner_color = _rr_v4(r)
		c.outer_radius = _rr_f32(r); c.outer_thickness = _rr_f32(r); c.outer_color = _rr_v4(r)
		return c, true

	case .Fill_Wedge:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Wedge
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.start_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.end_angle = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); c.clockwise = _rr_bool(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Wedge:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Wedge
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r); c.start_angle = _rr_f32(r); c.end_angle = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.clockwise = _rr_bool(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Point:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Point; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Point_Scale:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Point_Scale; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Text:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.text = _rr_str(r); c.font = renderer.Font_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.mods = transmute(renderer.Text_Modifiers)_rr_u8(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Text_Advanced:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Text_Advanced
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.text = _rr_str(r); c.font = renderer.Font_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}
		for i in 0 ..< 8 { c.fallbacks[i] = renderer.Font_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)} }
		c.n_fallbacks = i32(_rr_u32(r)); c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.mods = transmute(renderer.Text_Modifiers)_rr_u8(r)
		return c, true

	case .Draw_Asset:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Asset
		c.common = _rr_common(r)
		c.handle.id = _rr_u32(r); c.handle.asset_type = assets.Asset_Type(_rr_u8(r)); c.handle.timestamp = _rr_i64(r)
		c.config.x = _rr_f32(r); c.config.y = _rr_f32(r); c.config.width = _rr_f32(r); c.config.height = _rr_f32(r)
		c.config.allow_sync_fallback = _rr_bool(r); c.config.tint_color = _rr_v4(r); c.config.opacity = _rr_f32(r); c.config.preserve_aspect = _rr_bool(r)
		return c, true

	case .Draw_Image:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.img = renderer.Image_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}; c.color = _rr_v4(r)
		return c, true

	case .Draw_Image_Rect:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image_Rect
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.dest = _rr_v4(r); c.src = _rr_v4(r); c.img = renderer.Image_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}; c.color = _rr_v4(r)
		return c, true

	case .Draw_Image_Rect_UV:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Image_Rect_UV_Mat
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.mat.image = renderer.Image_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}; c.mat.tint = _rr_v4(r); c.dest = _rr_v4(r); c.uvs = _rr_v4(r)
		c.filter = renderer.Sampler_Filter(_rr_u8(r)); c.repeat = _rr_bool(r); c.mipmap = _rr_bool(r)
		return c, true

	case .Shadow_Rect:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Rect
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.offset_x = _rr_f32(r); c.offset_y = _rr_f32(r); c.blur = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Shadow_Circle:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Circle
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.cx = _rr_f32(r); c.cy = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.offset_x = _rr_f32(r); c.offset_y = _rr_f32(r); c.blur = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Shadow_Ngon:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Ngon
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.cx = _rr_f32(r); c.cy = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.sides = int(_rr_u32(r)); c.offset_x = _rr_f32(r); c.offset_y = _rr_f32(r); c.blur = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Shadow_Silhouette:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Shadow_Silhouette
		c.common = _rr_common(r)
		c.key.kind = _rr_u8(r); c.key.w = _rr_f32(r); c.key.h = _rr_f32(r); c.key.r = _rr_f32(r)
		c.key.sides = i32(_rr_u32(r)); c.key.offset_x = _rr_f32(r); c.key.offset_y = _rr_f32(r); c.key.blur = _rr_f32(r)
		c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r)
		return c, true

	case .Inset_Shadow_Rect:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Inset_Shadow_Rect
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); c.top_depth = _rr_f32(r); c.side_depth = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r)
		return c, true

	case .Fill_Bezier_Quad:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Bezier_Quadratic
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.cx = _rr_f32(r); c.cy = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Fill_Bezier_Cubic:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Fill_Bezier_Cubic
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.c1x = _rr_f32(r); c.c1y = _rr_f32(r); c.c2x = _rr_f32(r); c.c2y = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r)
		c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Bezier_Quad:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Bezier_Quadratic
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.cx = _rr_f32(r); c.cy = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Bezier_Cubic:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Bezier_Cubic
		c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x1 = _rr_f32(r); c.y1 = _rr_f32(r); c.c1x = _rr_f32(r); c.c1y = _rr_f32(r); c.c2x = _rr_f32(r); c.c2y = _rr_f32(r); c.x2 = _rr_f32(r); c.y2 = _rr_f32(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r)
		c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .End_Pass:
		c: renderer.Cmd_End_Pass; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Path_Fill:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Path_Fill; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_path_pts(r); c.paint = _rr_paint(r); return c, true

	case .Path_Draw:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Path_Draw; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_path_pts(r); c.thickness = _rr_f32(r); c.color = _rr_v4(r); c.join = renderer.Line_Join(_rr_u8(r)); c.cap = renderer.Line_Cap(_rr_u8(r)); return c, true

	case .Path_Stroke:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Path_Stroke; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_path_pts(r); c.stroke = _rr_stroke(r); return c, true

	case .Draw_Ngon:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Draw_Ngon; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.cx = _rr_f32(r); c.cy = _rr_f32(r); c.radius = _rr_f32(r); c.sides = int(_rr_u32(r)); c.color = _rr_v4(r); return c, true

	case .Stroke_Gradient:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Stroke_Gradient; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.points = _rr_pts2(r); c.paint = _rr_paint(r); c.width = _rr_f32(r)
		c.options.edge_lines = _rr_bool(r); c.options.edge_color = _rr_v4(r); c.options.edge_width = _rr_f32(r)
		return c, true

	case .Set_Clip:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Set_Clip; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.x = _rr_f32(r); c.y = _rr_f32(r); c.w = _rr_f32(r); c.h = _rr_f32(r); return c, true

	case .Reset_Clip:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Reset_Clip; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Push_Matrix:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Push_Matrix; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Pop_Matrix:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Pop_Matrix; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Identity_Matrix:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Identity_Matrix; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Translate:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Translate; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.dx = _rr_f32(r); c.dy = _rr_f32(r); return c, true

	case .Rotate:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Rotate; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.angle = _rr_f32(r); return c, true

	case .Scale:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Scale; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.sx = _rr_f32(r); c.sy = _rr_f32(r); return c, true

	case .Apply_Matrix:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Apply_Matrix; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.m = _rr_mat3(r); return c, true

	case .Apply_Matrix4:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Apply_Matrix4; c.common = _rr_common(r); c.m = _rr_mat4(r); return c, true

	case .Begin_Mask:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Begin_Mask; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .End_Mask:
		c: renderer.Cmd_End_Mask; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .Begin_Masked_Draw:
		c: renderer.Cmd_Begin_Masked_Draw; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true

	case .End_Masked_Draw:
		c: renderer.Cmd_End_Masked_Draw; c.common = _rr_common(r); return c, true
	}
	return nil, false
}

// ── Write helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@(private) _fw   :: proc(f: _Rec_File_Handle, v: []u8)  { _rec_file_write(f, v) }
@(private) _fw_u8 :: proc(f: _Rec_File_Handle, v: u8)  { b := v; _fw(f, {b}) }
@(private) _fw_u16 :: proc(f: _Rec_File_Handle, v: u16) { b := transmute([2]u8)v; _fw(f, b[:]) }
@(private) _fw_u32 :: proc(f: _Rec_File_Handle, v: u32) { b := transmute([4]u8)v; _fw(f, b[:]) }

@(private) _bw_u8   :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: u8)  { append(b, v) }
@(private) _bw_u32  :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: u32) { x := transmute([4]u8)v; append(b, ..x[:]) }
@(private) _bw_i64  :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: i64) { x := transmute([8]u8)v; append(b, ..x[:]) }
@(private) _bw_f32  :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: f32) { x := transmute([4]u8)v; append(b, ..x[:]) }
@(private) _bw_bool :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: bool) { _bw_u8(b, u8(1) if v else 0) }

@(private)
_bw_v4 :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, v: [4]f32) {
	for c in v { _bw_f32(b, c) }
}

@(private)
_bw_mat3 :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, m: matrix[3, 3]f32) {
	flat := transmute([9]f32)m
	for v in flat { _bw_f32(b, v) }
}

@(private)
_bw_mat4 :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, m: matrix[4, 4]f32) {
	flat := transmute([16]f32)m
	for v in flat { _bw_f32(b, v) }
}

@(private)
_bw_str :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, s: string) {
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(s)))
	append(b, ..transmute([]u8)s)
}

@(private)
_bw_path_pts :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, pts: []renderer.Path_Point) {
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(pts)))
	for p in pts {
		_bw_u8(b, u8(p.type))
		_bw_f32(b, p.p[0]);  _bw_f32(b, p.p[1])
		_bw_f32(b, p.c1[0]); _bw_f32(b, p.c1[1])
		_bw_f32(b, p.c2[0]); _bw_f32(b, p.c2[1])
	}
}

@(private)
_bw_pts2 :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, pts: [][2]f32) {
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(pts)))
	for p in pts { _bw_f32(b, p[0]); _bw_f32(b, p[1]) }
}

@(private)
_bw_common :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, c: renderer.Draw_Command_Common) {
	_bw_u8(b, u8(c.layer))
	_bw_f32(b, c.opacity)
	// target (rawptr) intentionally omitted — always nil on replay
	_bw_bool(b, c.flushed)
	_bw_mat3(b, c.transform)
	_bw_v4(b, c.scissor)
	_bw_bool(b, c.scissor_on)
	_bw_u8(b, c.stencil_level)
	_bw_u8(b, c.pip_variant)
}

@(private)
_bw_paint :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, p: renderer.Paint) {
	_bw_u8(b, u8(p.type))
	_bw_f32(b, p.opacity)
	_bw_v4(b, p.color)
	// gradient_stops (slice)
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(p.gradient_stops)))
	for v in p.gradient_stops { _bw_f32(b, v) }
	// gradient_colors (slice)
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(p.gradient_colors)))
	for c in p.gradient_colors { _bw_v4(b, c) }
	// linear gradient
	_bw_f32(b, p.linear_start[0]); _bw_f32(b, p.linear_start[1])
	_bw_f32(b, p.linear_end[0]);   _bw_f32(b, p.linear_end[1])
	// radial/conical/pattern/image
	_bw_f32(b, p.center[0]); _bw_f32(b, p.center[1])
	_bw_f32(b, p.radius)
	_bw_f32(b, p.start_angle)
	_bw_u32(b, p.image.id)
	_bw_mat3(b, p.uv_transform)
	_bw_bool(b, p.repeat)
	_bw_u8(b, u8(p.fill_rule))
}

@(private)
_bw_stroke :: proc(b: ^[dynamic]u8, s: renderer.Stroke) {
	_bw_f32(b, s.width)
	_bw_paint(b, s.paint)
	_bw_u8(b, u8(s.cap))
	_bw_u8(b, u8(s.join))
	_bw_f32(b, s.miter_limit)
	_bw_u32(b, u32(len(s.dash_array)))
	for v in s.dash_array { _bw_f32(b, v) }
	_bw_f32(b, s.dash_offset)
	_bw_paint(b, s.dash_paint)
	_bw_bool(b, s.has_dash_paint)
}

// ── Read helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

_Reader :: struct {
	data: []u8,
	pos:  int,
	ok:   bool,
}

@(private) _rr_u8 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> u8 {
	if !r.ok || r.pos >= len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return 0 }
	v := r.data[r.pos]; r.pos += 1; return v
}
@(private) _rr_u16 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> u16 {
	if !r.ok || r.pos + 1 >= len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return 0 }
	v: [2]u8; v[0] = r.data[r.pos]; v[1] = r.data[r.pos+1]; r.pos += 2
	return transmute(u16)v
}
@(private) _rr_u32 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> u32 {
	if !r.ok || r.pos + 3 >= len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return 0 }
	v: [4]u8; for i in 0 ..< 4 { v[i] = r.data[r.pos+i] }; r.pos += 4
	return transmute(u32)v
}
@(private) _rr_i64 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> i64 {
	if !r.ok || r.pos + 7 >= len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return 0 }
	v: [8]u8; for i in 0 ..< 8 { v[i] = r.data[r.pos+i] }; r.pos += 8
	return transmute(i64)v
}
@(private) _rr_f32 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> f32 {
	v := _rr_u32(r); return transmute(f32)v
}
@(private) _rr_bool :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> bool { return _rr_u8(r) != 0 }
@(private) _rr_bytes :: proc(r: ^_Reader, dst: []u8) {
	if !r.ok || r.pos + len(dst) > len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return }
	copy(dst, r.data[r.pos:]); r.pos += len(dst)
}

@(private)
_rr_v4 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> [4]f32 {
	return {_rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r)}
}

@(private)
_rr_mat3 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> matrix[3, 3]f32 {
	flat: [9]f32
	for &v in flat { v = _rr_f32(r) }
	return transmute(matrix[3, 3]f32)flat
}

@(private)
_rr_mat4 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> matrix[4, 4]f32 {
	flat: [16]f32
	for &v in flat { v = _rr_f32(r) }
	return transmute(matrix[4, 4]f32)flat
}

@(private)
_rr_str :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> string {
	n := int(_rr_u32(r))
	if !r.ok || r.pos + n > len(r.data) { r.ok = false; return "" }
	buf := make([]u8, n, context.temp_allocator)
	copy(buf, r.data[r.pos:]); r.pos += n
	return string(buf)
}

@(private)
_rr_path_pts :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> []renderer.Path_Point {
	n := int(_rr_u32(r))
	pts := make([]renderer.Path_Point, n, context.temp_allocator)
	for &p in pts {
		p.type = renderer.Path_Point_Type(_rr_u8(r))
		p.p[0] = _rr_f32(r); p.p[1] = _rr_f32(r)
		p.c1[0] = _rr_f32(r); p.c1[1] = _rr_f32(r)
		p.c2[0] = _rr_f32(r); p.c2[1] = _rr_f32(r)
	}
	return pts
}

@(private)
_rr_pts2 :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> [][2]f32 {
	n := int(_rr_u32(r))
	pts := make([][2]f32, n, context.temp_allocator)
	for &p in pts { p[0] = _rr_f32(r); p[1] = _rr_f32(r) }
	return pts
}

@(private)
_rr_common :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> renderer.Draw_Command_Common {
	c: renderer.Draw_Command_Common
	c.layer         = renderer.Draw_Layer(_rr_u8(r))
	c.opacity       = _rr_f32(r)
	c.target        = nil // not serialised
	c.flushed       = _rr_bool(r)
	c.transform     = _rr_mat3(r)
	c.scissor       = _rr_v4(r)
	c.scissor_on    = _rr_bool(r)
	c.stencil_level = _rr_u8(r)
	c.pip_variant   = _rr_u8(r)
	return c
}

@(private)
_rr_paint :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> renderer.Paint {
	p: renderer.Paint
	p.type    = renderer.Paint_Type(_rr_u8(r))
	p.opacity = _rr_f32(r)
	p.color   = _rr_v4(r)
	// gradient_stops
	n_stops := int(_rr_u32(r))
	if n_stops > 0 {
		stops := make([]f32, n_stops, context.temp_allocator)
		for &v in stops { v = _rr_f32(r) }
		p.gradient_stops = stops
	}
	// gradient_colors
	n_colors := int(_rr_u32(r))
	if n_colors > 0 {
		colors := make([][4]f32, n_colors, context.temp_allocator)
		for &c in colors { c = _rr_v4(r) }
		p.gradient_colors = colors
	}
	p.linear_start = {_rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r)}
	p.linear_end   = {_rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r)}
	p.center       = {_rr_f32(r), _rr_f32(r)}
	p.radius       = _rr_f32(r)
	p.start_angle  = _rr_f32(r)
	p.image        = renderer.Image_Handle{id = _rr_u32(r)}
	p.uv_transform = _rr_mat3(r)
	p.repeat       = _rr_bool(r)
	p.fill_rule    = renderer.Fill_Rule(_rr_u8(r))
	return p
}

@(private)
_rr_stroke :: proc(r: ^_Reader) -> renderer.Stroke {
	s: renderer.Stroke
	s.width       = _rr_f32(r)
	s.paint       = _rr_paint(r)
	s.cap         = renderer.Line_Cap(_rr_u8(r))
	s.join        = renderer.Line_Join(_rr_u8(r))
	s.miter_limit = _rr_f32(r)
	n := int(_rr_u32(r))
	if n > 0 {
		da := make([]f32, n, context.temp_allocator)
		for &v in da { v = _rr_f32(r) }
		s.dash_array = da
	}
	s.dash_offset  = _rr_f32(r)
	s.dash_paint   = _rr_paint(r)
	s.has_dash_paint = _rr_bool(r)
	return s
}
